name.fr: Efficacite du catalyseur sous le seuil (banque 1)

description.fr: Quand votre voiture affiche un code P0420, ca veut dire que le catalyseur — ce gros pot en forme de boite sous votre voiture — ne fait plus correctement son boulot de nettoyage des gaz d'echappement. Le calculateur moteur compare les signaux de la sonde lambda avant et apres le catalyseur. Si les deux signaux se ressemblent trop, ca signifie que le catalyseur ne transforme plus assez les polluants. C'est un probleme frequent sur les vehicules de plus de 100 000 km. Pas de panique immediate, mais il faut agir avant le controle technique, car un catalyseur defaillant est un motif de refus systematique. En attendant la reparation, votre voiture consomme plus et pollue davantage.
description.en: When your car shows a P0420 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to catalytic converter efficiency below threshold (bank 1). Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.

name.fr: Fuite d'echappement en amont du catalyseur
name.en: Exhaust leak upstream of catalytic converter

fr.question: Peut-on rouler avec un code P0420 ?
fr.answer: Oui, vous pouvez rouler, mais votre voiture pollue plus et consomme davantage. C'est un motif de refus au controle technique, donc ne tardez pas trop a vous en occuper.

fr.question: Combien coute le remplacement d'un catalyseur ?
fr.answer: En France, comptez entre 400 et 1500 euros selon la marque et le modele. En Suisse, les prix sont 30 a 50% plus eleves. Parfois, c'est juste la sonde lambda a changer, ce qui revient beaucoup moins cher.

fr.question: Comment savoir si c'est le catalyseur ou la sonde lambda ?
fr.answer: Un bon diagnostic OBD2 avec lecture des donnees en temps reel permet de voir si les sondes fonctionnent correctement. Si la sonde aval oscille comme la sonde amont, le catalyseur est probablement use.

en.question: What does the P0420 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0420 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with catalytic converter efficiency below threshold (bank 1). This is a high-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0420 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0420 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0420 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0420 fault typically range from around £68 to £1230, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is worn or damaged catalytic converter, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

description.fr: Le code P0171 indique que votre moteur recoit trop d'air par rapport au carburant — on dit que le melange est trop pauvre. Le calculateur essaie de compenser en ajoutant du carburant, mais quand il atteint sa limite de correction, il allume le voyant moteur. Les causes sont variees : une prise d'air sur le circuit d'admission, un debitmetre encrasse, un filtre a carburant bouche ou des injecteurs fatigues. Ce code est tres courant et ne represente generalement pas un danger immediat, mais il peut provoquer des a-coups, des hesitations a l'acceleration et une surconsommation. Mieux vaut le diagnostiquer rapidement pour eviter d'endommager le catalyseur a la longue.
description.en: A P0171 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with fuel mixture too lean (bank 1). The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

name.fr: Prise d'air sur le circuit d'admission
name.en: Air leak on the intake system
Dirty or faulty mass air flow (MAF) sensor

name.fr: Pompe a carburant faible ou filtre bouche
name.en: Weak fuel pump or blocked filter

fr.question: Qu'est-ce qu'un melange pauvre exactement ?
fr.answer: Le moteur a besoin d'un ratio precis entre l'air et le carburant (environ 14.7 parts d'air pour 1 part d'essence). Quand il y a trop d'air ou pas assez de carburant, le melange est dit pauvre.

fr.question: Est-ce que le P0171 peut endommager le moteur ?
fr.answer: Un melange trop pauvre sur une longue periode peut provoquer une surchauffe des soupapes et endommager le catalyseur. Il vaut mieux s'en occuper dans les semaines qui suivent l'apparition du code.

fr.question: Peut-on nettoyer le debitmetre soi-meme ?
fr.answer: Oui, avec un nettoyant specifique pour debitmetre (MAF cleaner). C'est une operation simple qui regle le probleme dans environ 30% des cas. Ne jamais utiliser de nettoyant frein ou autre produit non adapte.

en.question: What does the P0171 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0171 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with fuel mixture too lean (bank 1). This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0171 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0171 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0171 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0171 fault typically range from around £25 to £434, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is air leak on the intake system, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le code P0172 est l'inverse du P0171 : votre moteur recoit trop de carburant par rapport a l'air. Le calculateur detecte que la correction carburant a long terme depasse sa plage normale du cote riche. Concretement, ca signifie que vos injecteurs envoient trop d'essence ou que votre capteur d'air sous-estime la quantite d'air entrant. Vous pouvez remarquer une fumee noire a l'echappement, une consommation en hausse et parfois une odeur d'essence. Les bougies d'allumage s'encrassent plus vite et le catalyseur souffre d'un exces de carburant non brule. Un regulateur de pression de carburant defaillant ou une sonde lambda paresseuse font partie des causes frequentes. Diagnostiquer ce code rapidement evite de griller votre catalyseur prematurement.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0172 relates to fuel mixture too rich (bank 1), which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

name.fr: Injecteurs qui fuient ou restent ouverts
Regulateur de pression de carburant defaillant

fr.question: Pourquoi ma voiture sent l'essence avec un P0172 ?
fr.answer: L'exces de carburant ne brule pas completement dans le moteur. L'essence non brulee sort par l'echappement et peut aussi impregner l'huile moteur, d'ou cette odeur caractéristique.

fr.question: Est-ce que je consomme plus avec ce code ?
fr.answer: Oui, un melange trop riche augmente la consommation de 10 a 25%. C'est de l'argent gaspille a chaque plein en attendant la reparation.

fr.question: Comment differencier un probleme d'injecteur d'un probleme de capteur ?
fr.answer: Un diagnostic OBD2 avec lecture des corrections carburant en temps reel permet de le determiner. Si la correction est uniforme sur tous les cylindres, c'est plutot un capteur. Si c'est localise, c'est un injecteur.

en.question: What does the P0172 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0172 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with fuel mixture too rich (bank 1). This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0172 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0172 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0172 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0172 fault typically range from around £66 to £423, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is leaking or stuck-open fuel injectors, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le code P0300 signifie que votre moteur a des rates d'allumage sur plusieurs cylindres en meme temps. Un rate d'allumage, c'est quand le melange air-carburant ne s'enflamme pas correctement dans un cylindre. Quand ca touche plusieurs cylindres a la fois, le moteur vibre fort, hesite, et peut meme caler. C'est un code a prendre au serieux car les rates d'allumage envoient du carburant non brule dans le catalyseur, ce qui peut le detruire par surchauffe. Les causes les plus frequentes sont des bougies ou des bobines d'allumage en fin de vie, mais ca peut aussi venir d'un probleme de compression, d'une distribution decalee ou d'injecteurs bouches. Si votre voyant moteur clignote avec ce code, arretez-vous des que possible.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0300 code, it is telling you there is a problem with multiple misfires detected. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.

fr.question: Quelle est la difference entre P0300 et P0301 ?
fr.answer: Le P0300 signale des rates sur plusieurs cylindres simultanement, tandis que P0301 pointe specifiquement le cylindre 1. Un P0300 est souvent plus inquietant car il suggere un probleme generalise.

fr.question: Mon voyant moteur clignote avec ce code, c'est grave ?
fr.answer: Un voyant clignotant signifie que les rates sont suffisamment severes pour endommager le catalyseur. Reduisez votre vitesse et rendez-vous chez un garagiste des que possible.

fr.question: Peut-on conduire avec des rates d'allumage multiples ?
fr.answer: On deconseille fortement de continuer a rouler. Les rates d'allumage envoient du carburant non brule dans le catalyseur, qui peut surchauffer et meme provoquer un incendie dans les cas extremes.

en.question: What does the P0300 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0300 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with multiple misfires detected. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0300 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will P0300 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0300 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0300 fault typically range from around £35 to £1748, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is worn spark plugs, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

description.fr: Le P0301 pointe du doigt le cylindre numero 1 de votre moteur. Ce cylindre ne brule pas correctement le melange air-carburant a chaque tour. Vous ressentez ca comme une vibration reguliere, une perte de puissance et parfois un ralenti saccade. C'est generalement la bougie ou la bobine d'allumage du cylindre 1 qui est en cause. Sur certains vehicules, le cylindre 1 est plus expose a la chaleur du radiateur, ce qui peut accelerer l'usure de la bobine. Bonne nouvelle : quand c'est localise sur un seul cylindre, la reparation est souvent simple et pas trop couteuse. Commencez par permuter la bobine du cylindre 1 avec un autre cylindre pour voir si le defaut se deplace — ca confirme que c'est bien la bobine le coupable.
description.en: A P0301 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with misfire detected — cylinder 1. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

name.en: Spark plug cylinder 1 worn or clogged
Ignition coil of ignition cylinder 1 faulty

fr.question: Comment trouver le cylindre 1 sur mon moteur ?
fr.answer: Le cylindre 1 est generalement le plus proche de la distribution (courroie ou chaine). Consultez le manuel de votre vehicule car l'ordre varie selon les constructeurs.

fr.question: Est-ce que je dois changer toutes les bougies ou juste celle du cylindre 1 ?
fr.answer: Quand une bougie est usee, les autres ne sont generalement pas loin. On recommande de les changer toutes en meme temps pour un entretien homogene.

fr.question: Comment savoir si c'est la bougie ou la bobine ?
fr.answer: Permutez la bobine du cylindre 1 avec celle d'un autre cylindre. Si le defaut se deplace vers l'autre cylindre, c'est la bobine. Sinon, verifiez la bougie et l'injecteur.

en.question: What does the P0301 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0301 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with misfire detected — cylinder 1. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0301 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0301 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0301 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0301 fault typically range from around £9 to £248, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is spark plug cylinder 1 worn or clogged, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0302 indique que le cylindre 2 de votre moteur ne fonctionne pas correctement. Le calculateur detecte, via le capteur de vilebrequin, que ce cylindre produit moins de puissance que les autres. Le moteur tourne sur trois pattes au lieu de quatre, ce qui se traduit par des vibrations et une perte de reprise notable. Comme pour le cylindre 1, les suspects habituels sont la bougie, la bobine et l'injecteur. Verifiez aussi le faisceau electrique de la bobine du cylindre 2 car un fil coupe ou un connecteur oxyde peut causer exactement le meme symptome. La methode de permutation des bobines reste le meilleur outil de diagnostic maison avant d'aller chez le garagiste. Rouler longtemps avec un rate sur un seul cylindre augmente le risque de detruire le catalyseur.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0302 relates to misfire detected — cylinder 2, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

fr.question: Le P0302 peut-il etre intermittent ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est frequent. Le rate peut ne se produire qu'a froid ou sous forte charge. Le code peut meme s'effacer de lui-meme puis revenir plus tard. Un diagnostic OBD2 en temps reel permet de surveiller les compteurs de rates.

fr.question: Est-ce dangereux de rouler avec un P0302 ?
fr.answer: Pas immediatement dangereux pour la securite, mais le carburant non brule endommage progressivement le catalyseur. Si le voyant clignote, arretez-vous rapidement.

fr.question: Combien coute la reparation d'un P0302 ?
fr.answer: Si c'est une bougie, comptez 10 a 40 euros la piece. Une bobine revient entre 40 et 150 euros. Un injecteur est plus cher, entre 80 et 300 euros. La main d'oeuvre est generalement d'une heure.

en.question: What does the P0302 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0302 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with misfire detected — cylinder 2. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

The most common fix is spark plug cylinder 2 defective, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0303 concerne le cylindre 3. Le moteur detecte que ce cylindre ne contribue pas sa part de puissance lors de chaque rotation. Sur un moteur 4 cylindres, c'est le troisieme en partant de la distribution. Les vibrations et la perte de puissance sont les symptomes classiques. Le cylindre 3 est parfois sujet a des problemes thermiques car il se trouve au milieu du bloc et dissipe moins bien la chaleur que les cylindres exterieurs. Sur certains vehicules diesel avec rampe commune, un probleme de pression de rail peut aussi causer un rate localise sur ce cylindre. Commencez par la verification la plus simple — la bougie et la bobine — avant d'envisager des causes plus complexes comme un probleme de compression ou de joint de culasse.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0303 code, it is telling you there is a problem with misfire detected — cylinder 3. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.

fr.question: Le cylindre 3 est-il plus sujet aux pannes ?
fr.answer: Pas specifiquement, mais sur certains moteurs il peut etre moins bien refroidi que les cylindres en bout de bloc. Les taux de panne restent comparables entre cylindres dans la plupart des cas.

fr.question: Faut-il remplacer toutes les bobines quand une seule est en panne ?
fr.answer: Pas obligatoirement, mais si le vehicule a beaucoup de kilometres et qu'une bobine lache, les autres ne sont pas loin. Remplacer le jeu complet est souvent recommande pour la tranquillite.

fr.question: Un probleme de compression, c'est grave ?
fr.answer: C'est plus serieux car ca implique une usure mecanique interne du moteur : segments, soupapes ou joint de culasse. Un test de compression permet de confirmer et d'evaluer la gravite.

en.question: What does the P0303 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0303 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with misfire detected — cylinder 3. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0304 pointe le cylindre 4, generalement le plus eloigne de la distribution sur un 4 cylindres en ligne. Ce cylindre presente des rates d'allumage que le calculateur detecte grace aux variations de vitesse du vilebrequin. Le cylindre 4 est souvent le plus expose aux temperatures elevees du collecteur d'echappement, ce qui peut accelerer l'usure de la bougie et de la bobine. Sur les moteurs turbo, ce cylindre est parfois celui qui souffre le plus des contraintes thermiques. La demarche diagnostique est identique aux autres cylindres : verifier d'abord bougie et bobine par permutation, puis injecteur et compression si le probleme persiste. Un bon mecanicien commence toujours par les causes les plus simples et les moins couteuses avant d'explorer les pistes complexes.
description.en: A P0304 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with misfire detected — cylinder 4. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

fr: Vibrations au ralenti et en charge
en: Vibrations at idle and under load

fr.question: Le cylindre 4 chauffe-t-il plus que les autres ?
fr.answer: Sur un moteur en ligne, le cylindre 4 est souvent pres du collecteur d'echappement et peut effectivement etre plus chaud. Cela varie selon l'architecture du moteur.

fr.question: Comment permuter les bobines pour diagnostic ?
fr.answer: Echangez la bobine du cylindre 4 avec celle du cylindre 1 par exemple. Effacez les codes et roulez. Si le code passe de P0304 a P0301, c'est bien la bobine qui est en cause.

fr.question: Un rate sur un seul cylindre abime-t-il le moteur ?
fr.answer: Pas directement le moteur, mais le catalyseur en prend un coup. Le carburant non brule qui passe dans le pot catalytique le fait surchauffer et reduit sa duree de vie.

en.question: What does the P0304 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0304 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with misfire detected — cylinder 4. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0304 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0304 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0304 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0304 fault typically range from around £9 to £260, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is spark plug cylinder 4 defective, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Temperature du liquide de refroidissement sous le seuil
name.en: Coolant temperature below thermostat regulating range

description.fr: Le code P0128 signifie que votre moteur met trop de temps a atteindre sa temperature normale de fonctionnement. Le calculateur s'attend a ce que le liquide de refroidissement atteigne environ 70-80 degres dans un delai precis apres le demarrage, et si ca ne se produit pas, il enregistre ce code. La cause la plus frequente est un thermostat bloque en position ouverte. Le thermostat est une vanne qui controle la circulation du liquide de refroidissement : quand il reste ouvert, le liquide circule en permanence par le radiateur et le moteur ne chauffe jamais assez. Les consequences sont une surconsommation, un chauffage d'habitacle qui ne chauffe pas bien et des emissions polluantes accrues. En hiver, ce code est particulierement genant car le chauffage de l'habitacle depend directement de la temperature du moteur.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0128 relates to coolant temperature below thermostat regulating range, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

name.fr: Ventilateur de refroidissement en marche permanente

fr.question: Mon chauffage ne chauffe plus, est-ce lie au P0128 ?
fr.answer: Tres probablement oui. Si le moteur ne monte pas en temperature a cause d'un thermostat bloque, le liquide de refroidissement qui passe dans le radiateur de chauffage n'est pas assez chaud.

fr.question: Le thermostat est-il cher a remplacer ?
fr.answer: La piece coute entre 15 et 50 euros selon la marque. Avec la main d'oeuvre, comptez 60 a 200 euros en France. C'est une des reparations les plus abordables de cette liste.

fr.question: Ce code apparait surtout en hiver, pourquoi ?
fr.answer: En hiver, l'air froid refroidit le moteur plus vite. Un thermostat qui commence a faiblir peut fonctionner correctement en ete mais ne plus suffire a maintenir la temperature en hiver.

en.question: What does the P0128 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0128 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with coolant temperature below thermostat regulating range. This is a low-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0128 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0128 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0128 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0128 fault typically range from around £25 to £253, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is thermostat stuck open, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Petite fuite detectee dans le systeme EVAP
name.en: Small leak detected in EVAP system

description.fr: Le code P0442 indique que votre systeme de recuperation des vapeurs d'essence (systeme EVAP) presente une petite fuite. Ce systeme empeche les vapeurs de carburant de s'echapper dans l'atmosphere. Le calculateur teste regulierement l'etancheite du circuit et quand il detecte une fuite legere, il allume le voyant. La cause la plus banale est un bouchon de reservoir mal ferme ou endommage. Verifiez d'abord que votre bouchon clique bien quand vous le serrez. Si ce n'est pas le bouchon, ca peut etre un tuyau EVAP fissure, une vanne de purge qui ne ferme plus correctement ou le canister (reservoir de charbon actif) lui-meme. Ce code n'affecte pas du tout les performances du moteur, mais il empeche de passer le controle technique dans certains pays.
description.en: When your car shows a P0442 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to small leak detected in evap system. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.

name.fr: Bouchon de reservoir mal ferme ou defectueux

fr.question: Est-ce que c'est juste le bouchon d'essence ?
fr.answer: Dans environ 40% des cas, oui. Verifiez que le bouchon se ferme avec un clic et que le joint en caoutchouc n'est pas fissure. Un bouchon neuf coute entre 10 et 40 euros.

fr.question: Le P0442 affecte-t-il la conduite ?
fr.answer: Non, pas du tout. Votre voiture roule exactement pareil. C'est purement un probleme de recuperation des vapeurs d'essence, donc un enjeu environnemental et de controle technique.

fr.question: Peut-on simplement effacer le code et l'oublier ?
fr.answer: Vous pouvez effacer le code, mais s'il revient, c'est qu'il y a vraiment une fuite a reparer. Ignorer le probleme ne le fera pas disparaitre et vous aurez des soucis au controle technique.

en.question: What does the P0442 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0442 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with small leak detected in evap system. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0442 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0442 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0442 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0442 fault typically range from around £9 to £175, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is loose or defective fuel cap, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

name.fr: Grande fuite detectee dans le systeme EVAP
name.en: Large leak detected in EVAP system

description.fr: Le P0455 est la version severe du P0442. Le systeme EVAP a detecte une fuite importante dans le circuit de recuperation des vapeurs de carburant. Contrairement a une petite fuite, ici le calculateur mesure une perte de pression significative lors de son test d'etancheite. La premiere chose a verifier est encore le bouchon de reservoir — s'il manque completement ou s'il est tres abime, ca suffit a declencher ce code. Sinon, un tuyau debranche lors d'un entretien precedent, un canister fissure ou une vanne de purge bloquee ouverte sont les causes les plus probables. Ce code est frequent apres un passage au garage si un mecanicien a oublie de rebrancher un tuyau du circuit EVAP. L'odeur d'essence peut etre plus marquee qu'avec un P0442 et il est important de corriger le probleme pour des raisons de securite et d'environnement.
description.en: A P0455 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with large leak detected in evap system. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.

name.fr: Bouchon de reservoir absent ou tres endommage
name.en: Missing or heavily damaged fuel cap

fr.question: Quelle est la difference entre P0442 et P0455 ?
fr.answer: Le P0442 indique une petite fuite, le P0455 une grande fuite. La demarche diagnostique est similaire, mais le P0455 est souvent plus facile a trouver car la fuite est plus importante et donc plus visible.

fr.question: Ce code peut-il apparaitre apres un passage au garage ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est frequent. Si un mecanicien a travaille dans la zone du moteur et a oublie de rebrancher un tuyau EVAP, le code apparaitra au prochain cycle de test du calculateur.

fr.question: L'odeur d'essence est-elle dangereuse ?
fr.answer: Les vapeurs d'essence sont inflammables et nocives a respirer. Si vous sentez une forte odeur d'essence, faites verifier votre vehicule rapidement. Ne stationnez pas dans un garage ferme tant que le probleme n'est pas resolu.

en.question: What does the P0455 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0455 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with large leak detected in evap system. This is a medium-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0455 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0455 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0455 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0455 fault typically range from around £9 to £294, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is missing or heavily damaged fuel cap, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

description.fr: Le code P0401 signifie que la vanne EGR (recirculation des gaz d'echappement) ne laisse pas passer assez de gaz. La vanne EGR reinjecte une partie des gaz d'echappement dans l'admission pour reduire les oxydes d'azote polluants. Avec le temps, surtout sur les moteurs diesel et les moteurs essence a injection directe, cette vanne s'encrasse avec des depots de suie et de calamine. Quand elle est trop encrassee, elle ne s'ouvre plus suffisamment et le calculateur detecte que le debit EGR est trop faible. Les symptomes peuvent aller d'un simple voyant allume a des a-coups en conduite urbaine. Sur certains vehicules, un bon nettoyage de la vanne suffit a resoudre le probleme. Sur d'autres, il faut remplacer la vanne complete ou nettoyer les conduits d'admission qui sont egalement bouches par la calamine.
description.en: The P0401 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with egr flow insufficient. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.

fr.question: Peut-on nettoyer la vanne EGR soi-meme ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est possible avec un nettoyant EGR specifique. Il faut demonter la vanne, la tremper et la nettoyer. Cela demande un minimum d'outillage et de connaissances, mais c'est faisable.

fr.question: Supprimer l'EGR est-il legal ?
fr.answer: Non, la suppression de la vanne EGR est illegale dans tous les pays de l'UE et en Suisse. C'est aussi un motif de refus au controle technique. Meme si ca tente certains, c'est fortement deconseille.

fr.question: Comment eviter l'encrassement de l'EGR ?
fr.answer: Roulez regulierement sur autoroute pour que le moteur chauffe bien et brule les depots. Evitez les courts trajets repetitifs qui favorisent l'encrassement. Un decalaminage preventif peut aussi aider.

en.question: What does the P0401 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0401 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with egr flow insufficient. This is a medium-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0401 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0401 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0401 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0401 fault typically range from around £43 to £511, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is clogged egr valve, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

description.fr: Le code P0440 est un code general qui signale un dysfonctionnement dans le systeme de controle des emissions evaporatives de votre vehicule. Ce systeme empeche les vapeurs d'essence du reservoir de s'echapper dans l'atmosphere. A la difference du P0442 ou P0455 qui pointent la taille de la fuite, le P0440 indique un probleme general du systeme sans preciser exactement ou il se situe. Cela peut aller du simple bouchon de reservoir mal serre a un probleme plus complexe de la vanne de purge, du canister ou des lignes de vapeur. Le calculateur effectue des tests d'etancheite et de debit du systeme EVAP, et si les resultats ne correspondent pas aux parametres attendus, il stocke ce code. Votre voiture roule normalement avec ce code, mais il faut le resoudre pour le controle technique et pour l'environnement.
description.en: When your car shows a P0440 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to evap system malfunction. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.

name.fr: Vanne de purge du canister defaillante
Fuite sur les lignes de vapeur EVAP

fr.question: Le P0440 est-il different du P0442 ?
fr.answer: Oui, le P0440 est un code general du systeme EVAP, tandis que le P0442 specifie qu'il s'agit d'une petite fuite. Le P0440 peut couvrir des problemes de fuite, de debit ou de fonctionnement des composants.

fr.question: Dois-je m'inquieter pour ma securite ?
fr.answer: Pas pour la conduite elle-meme, mais les vapeurs d'essence qui s'echappent sont inflammables et polluantes. Faites reparer quand c'est possible, surtout si vous sentez une odeur d'essence.

fr.question: Peut-on confondre ce code avec un probleme moteur ?
fr.answer: Non, le systeme EVAP est completement separe du fonctionnement du moteur. Votre voiture roulera exactement pareil, seul le voyant est allume.

en.question: What does the P0440 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0440 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with evap system malfunction. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0440 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. en.question: Will P0440 fail my MOT?

en.question: How much does P0440 repair cost in the UK?

The most common fix is defective fuel cap, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.fr: Regime de ralenti superieur au seuil

description.fr: Le P0507 signifie que le moteur tourne trop vite au ralenti — typiquement au-dessus de 200 tours/minute par rapport a la consigne normale. Au lieu de tourner a 750-800 tours/minute comme prevu, votre moteur reste bloque plus haut, par exemple a 1000 ou 1200 tours. C'est souvent du a une prise d'air sur le circuit d'admission apres le papillon des gaz, ou a un boitier papillon encrasse qui reste legerement ouvert. Le moteur de ralenti (actuateur de ralenti ou papillon motorise) peut aussi etre en cause s'il est bloque ou si son capteur de position envoie de fausses informations. Un simple nettoyage du boitier papillon resout le probleme dans de nombreux cas. Si le ralenti est trop haut, la voiture a tendance a avancer seule en automatique et la consommation augmente au feu rouge.
description.en: A P0507 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with idle speed higher than expected. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

name.fr: Prise d'air sur le circuit d'admission
name.en: Air leak on the intake system

fr: Voiture avance seule en boite automatique

fr.question: Pourquoi mon moteur tourne trop vite au ralenti ?
fr.answer: Le calculateur recoit soit trop d'air (prise d'air, papillon encrasse) soit une information erronee du capteur de position du papillon. Il ne parvient pas a reduire le regime au niveau voulu.

fr.question: Un nettoyage du papillon peut-il resoudre le probleme ?
fr.answer: Dans environ la moitie des cas, oui. Le nettoyage du boitier papillon avec un produit adapte est une operation simple et peu couteuse. Apres nettoyage, il faut parfois faire un reapprentissage du ralenti avec l'outil de diagnostic.

fr.question: C'est dangereux un ralenti trop haut ?
fr.answer: Pas directement dangereux, mais genant en boite automatique car la voiture peut avancer seule quand vous relevez le pied du frein. Soyez vigilant dans les manoeuvres de stationnement.

en.question: What does the P0507 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0507 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with idle speed higher than expected. This is a low-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0507 code?
