However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0202 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0202 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0202 fault typically range from around £12 to £293, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is fuel injector cylinder 2 faulty, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0203 signale un probleme electrique sur l'injecteur du cylindre 3. Comme pour les autres codes d'injecteurs, les causes possibles sont un injecteur defaillant, un probleme de cablage ou un connecteur corrode. Le cylindre 3, situe au milieu du bloc moteur sur un 4 cylindres en ligne, est souvent le plus chaud car il est entoure de cylindres actifs des deux cotes. Cette chaleur supplementaire peut accelerer la degradation du connecteur et du cablage a proximite. Si vous avez des codes d'injecteurs sur plusieurs cylindres, pensez a verifier le faisceau complet car un faisceau endommage a un endroit peut avoir des problemes ailleurs aussi. Un test de resistance des injecteurs au multimetre est rapide et permet d'identifier immediatement un injecteur en court-circuit ou en circuit ouvert.
description.en: A P0203 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with fuel injector cylinder 3 — circuit fault. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

fr.question: Comment tester la resistance d'un injecteur ?
fr.answer: Debranchez le connecteur de l'injecteur et mesurez aux bornes avec un multimetre en mode resistance. La valeur doit etre entre 10 et 16 ohms (haute impedance) ou 2 a 5 ohms (basse impedance). Consultez les specs du constructeur.

fr.question: Un injecteur peut-il fuir mecaniquement sans code electrique ?
fr.answer: Oui, un injecteur peut fuir au niveau du nez ou du joint sans que le circuit electrique soit affecte. Dans ce cas, pas de code P0203 mais d'autres symptomes comme une surconsommation ou des fumees.

fr.question: Faut-il changer les 4 injecteurs si un seul est en panne ?
fr.answer: Pas necessairement, mais sur les moteurs diesel common rail a fort kilometrage, c'est souvent recommande pour maintenir l'equilibre d'injection entre les cylindres.

en.question: What does the P0203 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0203 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with fuel injector cylinder 3 — circuit fault. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0203 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0203 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0203 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0203 fault typically range from around £16 to £296, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is fuel injector cylinder 3 faulty, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0204 concerne le circuit electrique de l'injecteur du cylindre 4, le dernier cylindre sur un moteur 4 cylindres en ligne. Ce cylindre est souvent le plus expose a la chaleur du collecteur d'echappement, ce qui peut degrader plus rapidement le cablage et le connecteur de l'injecteur. Les symptomes et le diagnostic sont similaires aux autres codes d'injecteurs, mais la specificite du cylindre 4 est qu'un defaut ici peut etre confondu avec un probleme de soupape si le cylindre est aussi proche de la sortie d'echappement. Mesurez la resistance de l'injecteur, verifiez le connecteur et les fils. Si tout semble correct electriquement, faites un test mecanique de l'injecteur sur un banc d'essai pour verifier son debit et sa pulverisation. Un injecteur peut etre correct electriquement mais defaillant mecaniquement.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0204 relates to fuel injector cylinder 4 — circuit fault, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

name.fr: Cablage deteriore par la chaleur echappement
name.en: Wiring deteriore by the chaleur exhaust

fr.question: Le driver d'injecteur dans le calculateur, ca se repare ?
fr.answer: Oui, certains specialistes de reparation electronique peuvent remplacer le composant driver sur la carte du calculateur. C'est moins cher qu'un calculateur neuf mais requiert un specialiste.

fr.question: Comment savoir si c'est le driver du calculateur ?
fr.answer: Si l'injecteur et le cablage sont bons mais que le signal de commande est absent, le driver du calculateur est probablement en cause. Un oscilloscope permet de verifier le signal de commande.

fr.question: Un injecteur defaillant peut-il casser un moteur ?
fr.answer: Un injecteur bloque ouvert sur un diesel peut injecter trop de carburant dans le cylindre, provoquant un emballement (runaway diesel) ou un coup de belier hydraulique. C'est rare mais potentiellement destructeur.

en.question: What does the P0204 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0204 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with fuel injector cylinder 4 — circuit fault. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0204 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0204 fail my MOT?

en.question: How much does P0204 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0204 fault typically range from around £43 to £673, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is fuel injector cylinder 4 faulty, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Circuit primaire de la pompe a carburant — dysfonctionnement

description.fr: Le P0230 signale un probleme sur le circuit electrique principal de la pompe a carburant. Cette pompe, immergee dans le reservoir, envoie le carburant sous pression vers le moteur. Si son circuit d'alimentation est defaillant, la pompe ne tourne plus et le moteur s'arrete faute de carburant. Le relais de pompe a carburant est souvent le premier suspect car c'est lui qui commande l'alimentation electrique de la pompe. Un relais defaillant, un fusible grille ou un cablage endommage entre le relais et la pompe sont les causes les plus frequentes. La pompe elle-meme peut aussi etre en cause si son moteur electrique est en court-circuit ou en circuit ouvert. Quand vous mettez le contact, vous devriez entendre un bourdonnement bref venant du reservoir — c'est la pompe qui monte en pression. Si ce bruit est absent, le probleme est confirme.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0230 code, it is telling you there is a problem with fuel pump primary circuit — malfunction. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.

name.fr: Relais de pompe a carburant defaillant

fr: Pas de bruit de pompe au contact
en: No fuel pump noise on ignition
Loss of power then engine cuts out

fr.question: Comment entendre si la pompe fonctionne ?
fr.answer: Mettez le contact sans demarrer. Pendant 2-3 secondes, vous devriez entendre un bourdonnement sourd venant de l'arriere du vehicule (reservoir). Si rien ne se passe, la pompe ne recoit pas de courant.

fr.question: Le relais de pompe est-il facile a trouver ?
fr.answer: Oui, il est generalement dans la boite a fusibles sous le capot ou dans l'habitacle. Consultez le couvercle de la boite a fusibles ou le manuel pour identifier le relais de pompe a carburant.

fr.question: Une pompe peut-elle mourir d'un coup ?
fr.answer: Oui, mais il y a souvent des signes avant-coureurs : hesitations en cote, difficultes de demarrage a chaud, bruit anormal de la pompe. Rouler regulierement avec le reservoir presque vide accelere l'usure car le carburant refroidit la pompe.

en.question: What does the P0230 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0230 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with fuel pump primary circuit — malfunction. This is a critical-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0230 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will P0230 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0230 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0230 fault typically range from around £9 to £513, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty fuel pump relay, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

description.fr: Le P0243 concerne l'electrovanne qui controle la pression du turbocompresseur. Cette vanne, aussi appelee electrovanne de wastegate ou de regulation de suralimentation, ajuste la pression du turbo en ouvrant ou fermant la wastegate. Si cette vanne est defaillante, le turbo peut produire trop ou pas assez de pression. Trop de pression (suralimentation excessive) est dangereux pour le moteur et declenche un mode degrade. Pas assez de pression signifie une perte de puissance importante. L'electrovanne est un composant electromagnétique qui peut se bloquer par la calamine, surtout sur les diesels. Le conduit de depression qui relie l'electrovanne a l'actuateur de wastegate peut aussi etre fissure ou debranche. C'est un composant relativement accessible et pas trop couteux a remplacer, mais le diagnostic doit etre precis pour eviter de remplacer la mauvaise piece.
description.en: A P0243 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with boost pressure solenoid a — malfunction. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

fr.question: L'electrovanne de turbo, c'est la meme chose que la wastegate ?
fr.answer: Non, l'electrovanne commande la wastegate a distance via une depression. La wastegate est le clapet mecanique qui libere les gaz d'echappement pour reduire la vitesse du turbo. L'electrovanne est le cerveau, la wastegate est le muscle.

fr.question: Peut-on nettoyer l'electrovanne au lieu de la remplacer ?
fr.answer: Parfois oui, si elle est juste encrassee. Un nettoyage au carburant ou au nettoyant EGR peut la debloquer. Mais si la bobine electrique est grillee, le remplacement est necessaire.

fr.question: Un tuyau de depression fissure peut-il causer tous ces symptomes ?
fr.answer: Absolument. Un simple tuyau en caoutchouc a 5 euros, fissure par la chaleur, peut provoquer une perte totale de controle du turbo. C'est la premiere chose a verifier car c'est la cause la moins chere.

en.question: What does the P0243 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0243 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with boost pressure solenoid a — malfunction. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0243 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0243 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0243 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0243 fault typically range from around £8 to £2093, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is stuck wastegate solenoid, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

name.fr: Efficacite catalyseur sous le seuil — prechauffage (banque 1)
name.en: Catalytic converter efficiency below threshold — warm-up (bank 1)

description.fr: Le P0421 ressemble au P0420 mais se declenche pendant la phase de prechauffage du catalyseur, c'est-a-dire dans les premieres minutes apres le demarrage a froid. Le calculateur surveille la montee en temperature du catalyseur et detecte qu'il ne chauffe pas assez vite ou ne commence pas a fonctionner dans les delais prevus. Cela peut indiquer un catalyseur vieillissant qui a perdu une partie de sa capacite de stockage d'oxygene, ou un probleme de temperature moteur qui empeche le catalyseur d'atteindre sa temperature d'amorce. Le thermostat et la sonde de temperature sont aussi a verifier car un moteur qui chauffe lentement retarde le fonctionnement du catalyseur.
description.en: The P0421 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with catalytic converter efficiency below threshold — warm-up (bank 1). Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.

fr.question: Le P0421 est-il aussi grave que le P0420 ?
fr.answer: Il est souvent le signe avant-coureur du P0420. Le catalyseur fonctionne encore mais commence a fatiguer, surtout a froid. C'est le moment ideal pour diagnostiquer avant que ca s'aggrave.

fr.question: Le thermostat peut-il causer un P0421 ?
fr.answer: Oui, si le moteur met trop longtemps a chauffer, le catalyseur reste froid plus longtemps. Un thermostat bloque ouvert est une cause indirecte frequente.

fr.question: Faut-il remplacer le catalyseur ?
fr.answer: Pas necessairement. Commencez par verifier le thermostat et la sonde lambda. Si le catalyseur est encore fonctionnel a chaud, ces reparations moins couteuses peuvent suffire.

en.question: What does the P0421 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0421 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with catalytic converter efficiency below threshold — warm-up (bank 1). This is a medium-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0421 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0421 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0421 fault typically range from around £51 to £1242, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

description.fr: Le P0430 est l'equivalent du P0420 mais pour la banque 2 du moteur, presente uniquement sur les moteurs en V ou boxer. Le catalyseur du cote de la banque 2 ne convertit plus assez les polluants selon le calculateur. Les sondes lambda de la banque 2 montrent des signaux trop similaires avant et apres le catalyseur, indiquant que la conversion est insuffisante. Si vous avez a la fois P0420 et P0430, les deux catalyseurs sont uses et le remplacement sera plus couteux car il y en a deux. Si seul le P0430 apparait, le probleme est localise sur un seul cote, ce qui est plus rare et peut aussi indiquer un probleme specifique de sonde lambda sur cette banque.
description.en: When your car shows a P0430 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to catalytic converter efficiency below threshold (bank 2). Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.

fr.question: J'ai un 4 cylindres, puis-je avoir un P0430 ?
fr.answer: Non, les moteurs 4 cylindres en ligne n'ont qu'une banque et donc qu'un catalyseur. Ce code est specifique aux V6, V8 et moteurs boxer.

fr.question: Dois-je remplacer les deux catalyseurs ?
fr.answer: Seulement si les deux codes P0420 et P0430 sont presents. Si un seul code apparait, un seul catalyseur est en cause.

fr.question: Le P0430 est-il un motif de refus au CT ?
fr.answer: Oui, tout code emissions qui allume le voyant moteur est un motif de refus dans tous les pays europeens.

en.question: What does the P0430 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0430 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with catalytic converter efficiency below threshold (bank 2). This is a high-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0430 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0430 fail my MOT?

name.fr: Efficacite catalyseur sous le seuil — prechauffage (banque 2)
name.en: Catalytic converter efficiency below threshold — warm-up (bank 2)

description.fr: Le P0431 est l'equivalent du P0421 pour la banque 2. Il se declenche specifiquement pendant la phase de prechauffage, quand le catalyseur de la banque 2 ne monte pas assez vite en temperature ou en efficacite. Comme pour le P0421, les causes incluent un catalyseur vieillissant, un thermostat defaillant ou une sonde lambda lente. Sur les moteurs en V, les deux banques peuvent chauffer a des rythmes differents selon la configuration de l'echappement et l'emplacement du thermostat. Ce code est souvent le premier signe de fatigue du catalyseur cote banque 2 et merite une attention rapide pour eviter qu'il ne progresse vers un P0430 complet.
description.en: A P0431 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with catalytic converter efficiency below threshold — warm-up (bank 2). This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.

fr.question: Dois-je m'inquieter d'un P0431 ?
fr.answer: C'est un avertissement precoce. Le catalyseur fonctionne encore mais ses performances declinent. Traitez la cause sous-jacente pour prolonger sa vie.

fr.question: Ce code est-il frequent ?
fr.answer: Moins frequent que le P0420/P0430 car il ne concerne que les moteurs en V et seulement la phase de prechauffage. C'est un code relativement rare.

fr.question: Peut-on passer le CT avec un P0431 ?
fr.answer: Non, le voyant moteur allume est un motif de refus quelle que soit la severite du code.

name.fr: Systeme EVAP — debit de purge incorrect

description.fr: Le P0441 indique que le flux de vapeurs de carburant du canister vers le moteur n'est pas conforme aux attentes du calculateur. Le systeme EVAP stocke les vapeurs d'essence dans un canister au charbon actif puis les purge vers le moteur pour les bruler. Si le debit de purge est trop faible ou trop important, ce code est enregistre. La vanne de purge elle-meme peut etre bloquee, ou le canister peut etre sature. Un tuyau bouche ou deconnecte entre le canister et le collecteur d'admission est aussi une cause frequente. Ce code n'affecte pas la conduite mais contribue aux emissions polluantes.
description.en: The P0441 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with evap system — incorrect purge flow. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.

fr.question: C'est quoi le canister ?
fr.answer: Le canister est un boitier rempli de charbon actif qui absorbe les vapeurs d'essence du reservoir. Il les stocke temporairement puis les libere vers le moteur pour les bruler pendant la conduite.

fr.question: Le P0441 est-il lie au bouchon de reservoir ?
fr.answer: Pas directement. Le P0441 concerne le debit de purge entre le canister et le moteur, pas l'etancheite du systeme qui est plutot liee aux codes P0442 et P0455.

fr.question: La vanne de purge coute-t-elle cher ?
fr.answer: Non, entre 30 et 80 euros pour la piece. C'est accessible et le remplacement est rapide. Verifiez d'abord les tuyaux qui sont encore moins chers.

en.question: What does the P0441 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0441 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with evap system — incorrect purge flow. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

name.fr: Vanne de purge EVAP — circuit defaillant

description.fr: Le P0443 designe un probleme electrique sur la vanne de purge du systeme EVAP. Le calculateur ne parvient pas a commander correctement cette electrovanne, soit parce que le circuit est ouvert, soit parce que la bobine de la vanne est en court-circuit. La vanne de purge est une electrovanne qui s'ouvre sur commande du calculateur pour laisser passer les vapeurs du canister vers le moteur. Si le circuit est coupe, les vapeurs ne sont jamais purgees et le canister finit par saturer. Un connecteur corrode, un fil coupe ou une vanne dont la bobine a grille sont les principales causes. Ce code est purement electrique et n'a aucun impact sur la conduite quotidienne.
description.en: When your car shows a P0443 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to evap purge valve — circuit fault. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.

fr.question: Comment tester la vanne de purge ?
fr.answer: Debranchez le connecteur et mesurez la resistance aux bornes. Elle doit etre entre 20 et 40 ohms. Circuit ouvert ou court-circuit confirme une vanne defaillante.

fr.question: La vanne est-elle facile a trouver ?
fr.answer: Oui, elle est generalement sur le collecteur d'admission ou pres du reservoir de liquide de frein. Suivez le tuyau qui vient du canister vers le moteur.

fr.question: Ce code est-il un motif de refus au CT ?
fr.answer: Oui, car le voyant moteur est allume. De plus, le systeme antipollution ne fonctionne pas correctement.

name.fr: Systeme EVAP — circuit de ventilation defaillant

description.fr: Le P0446 signale un probleme sur le circuit de ventilation du systeme EVAP. Le canister dispose d'une ouverture vers l'atmosphere qui permet l'air de circuler pendant les cycles de purge et de test. Cette ouverture est controlee par une vanne de ventilation qui peut etre defaillante. Si cette vanne se bloque fermee, le systeme ne peut plus etre teste pour les fuites et le code apparait. Sur certains vehicules, la vanne de ventilation est integree au canister. Une toile d'araignee ou de la salete dans l'orifice de ventilation peut aussi bloquer le debit d'air et declencher le code. Ce probleme est absolument invisible pour le conducteur mais pose probleme au controle technique.
description.en: A P0446 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with evap system — vent circuit fault. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.

fr.question: Qu'est-ce que la ventilation EVAP ?
fr.answer: C'est un circuit d'air qui permet au canister de respirer. Quand le calculateur teste l'etancheite du systeme, il ferme cette ventilation pour creer un vide. Si la vanne est bloquee, le test echoue.

fr.question: Une araignee peut-elle causer ce code ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est arrive plus souvent qu'on ne le pense. L'orifice de ventilation du canister est un endroit ideal pour les insectes. Un simple nettoyage peut resoudre le probleme.

fr.question: Ce code est-il specifique a certaines marques ?
fr.answer: Il est plus frequent sur les vehicules americains et japonais qui ont des systemes EVAP plus elabores. Les vehicules europeens utilisent des codes similaires mais avec des variantes constructeur.

description.fr: Le P0456 est une version encore plus fine du P0442. Il detecte une fuite tres petite dans le systeme EVAP, souvent a peine mesurable. Les vehicules modernes ont des capteurs de pression tres sensibles dans le systeme EVAP qui peuvent detecter des fuites minuscules. Le bouchon de reservoir est encore une fois le suspect numero un, mais cette fois un simple joint de bouchon legerement aplati peut suffire a declencher le code. Les raccords des tuyaux EVAP qui se desserrent avec les vibrations sont aussi une cause frequente. Ce code est probablement le moins inquietant de tous les codes DTC — votre voiture fonctionne parfaitement, mais le systeme antipollution detecte une toute petite anomalie.

fr.question: Le P0456 est-il le code le moins grave ?
fr.answer: Parmi les codes emissions, oui. C'est une fuite minuscule qui n'affecte ni la conduite ni la consommation. Seul le voyant moteur et le controle technique sont concernes.

fr.question: Peut-on vivre avec un P0456 ?
fr.answer: Techniquement oui, mais le voyant moteur reste allume et peut masquer d'autres codes plus importants. De plus, le controle technique ne passera pas.

fr.question: Comment trouver une fuite aussi petite ?
fr.answer: Un garagiste utilise une machine a fumee EVAP qui injecte de la fumee dans le circuit. La fumee sort par la fuite, meme minuscule, et permet de la localiser visuellement.

description.fr: Le P0400 est le code generique de la vanne EGR indiquant un probleme de debit des gaz recircules. Le calculateur commande l'ouverture de la vanne EGR et mesure l'effet sur le fonctionnement du moteur, soit via un capteur de position EGR, soit via le capteur MAP ou le debitmetre. Si l'effet mesure ne correspond pas a la commande, ce code est enregistre. C'est un code tres courant sur les vehicules diesel et les moteurs essence turbo a injection directe, ou la vanne EGR s'encrasse rapidement par la calamine et la suie. Un decalaminage regulier est la meilleure prevention contre ce probleme. Les conduits d'admission en aval de la vanne EGR sont aussi concernes par l'encrassement.
description.en: When your car shows a P0400 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to exhaust gas recirculation — flow issue. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. fr.question: L'EGR est-elle obligatoire ?
fr.answer: Oui, la vanne EGR est obligatoire pour les normes antipollution. La supprimer est illegal et constitue un motif de refus au controle technique.

fr.question: Le decalaminage fonctionne-t-il vraiment ?
fr.answer: Pour la prevention et les cas legers d'encrassement, oui. Un decalaminage a l'hydrogene ou chimique peut prolonger la vie de l'EGR. Mais une vanne tres encrassee necessite un demontage et un nettoyage manuel.

fr.question: Les diesels sont-ils plus touches ?
fr.answer: Oui, les particules de suie des moteurs diesel encrassent l'EGR beaucoup plus vite. Les courts trajets urbains aggravent le phenomene car le moteur ne chauffe pas assez.

description.fr: Le P0402 est l'inverse du P0401 : la vanne EGR laisse passer trop de gaz d'echappement dans l'admission. Un exces de gaz recircules etouffe le moteur car ils remplacent l'air frais necessaire a la combustion. Le moteur manque de puissance, hesite et peut caler au ralenti. La cause la plus frequente est une vanne EGR bloquee en position ouverte par la calamine. Le diaphragme de la vanne peut aussi etre perce, permettant aux gaz de passer en permanence. Sur les EGR electroniques, un capteur de position defaillant peut faire croire au calculateur que la vanne est fermee alors qu'elle est ouverte, provoquant un debit excessif non compense.
description.en: A P0402 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with egr flow excessive. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.

fr.question: Un exces d'EGR peut-il faire caler le moteur ?
fr.answer: Oui, trop de gaz d'echappement dans l'admission remplace l'air frais et le moteur etouffe. C'est particulierement marqué au ralenti quand le debit d'air est faible.

fr.question: Comment debloquer une vanne EGR ?
fr.answer: Demontez-la, trempez-la dans du nettoyant EGR pendant plusieurs heures, puis grattez mecaniquement les depots. Si elle est bloquee par la calamine, un nettoyant seul ne suffit generalement pas.

fr.question: L'EGR electronique est-elle meilleure que la pneumatique ?
fr.answer: Elle est plus precise dans son ouverture mais aussi plus complexe et couteuse. Les deux types s'encrassent de la meme maniere.

en.question: What does the P0402 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0402 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with egr flow excessive. This is a medium-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0402 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0402 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0402 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0402 fault typically range from around £34 to £295, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is egr valve stuck open, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

name.fr: Circuit de recirculation EGR — dysfonctionnement electrique

description.fr: Le P0403 concerne specifiquement le circuit electrique de la vanne EGR electronique. Le calculateur detecte une anomalie dans la commande electrique de la vanne : circuit ouvert, court-circuit ou resistance hors plage. Contrairement au P0401 qui mesure le resultat, le P0403 pointe un probleme electrique pur. Le connecteur de la vanne EGR est souvent expose a la chaleur et aux vibrations, ce qui favorise la corrosion et les faux contacts. Le moteur electrique ou la bobine de l'EGR peut aussi griller avec le temps. Le calculateur met la vanne EGR en position fermee par defaut en cas de probleme electrique, ce qui augmente les emissions de NOx mais preserve le bon fonctionnement du moteur.
description.en: The P0403 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with egr recirculation circuit — electrical malfunction. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.

fr.question: La vanne EGR a-t-elle un moteur electrique ?
fr.answer: Les vannes EGR modernes oui. Le moteur electrique permet un controle precis de l'ouverture. Les anciennes vannes utilisaient une capsule a depression pour l'actionnement.

fr.question: Le calculateur ferme-t-il l'EGR en cas de panne electrique ?
fr.answer: Oui, par defaut la vanne reste fermee. Le moteur fonctionne normalement mais les emissions de NOx augmentent car il n'y a plus de recirculation.

fr.question: Comment tester le circuit electrique de l'EGR ?
fr.answer: Mesurez la resistance de la bobine ou du moteur aux bornes du connecteur. Verifiez aussi la tension d'alimentation et le signal de commande du calculateur avec un multimetre.

en.question: What does the P0403 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0403 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with egr recirculation circuit — electrical malfunction. This is a medium-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0403 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0403 fail my MOT?
en.answer: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

en.question: How much does P0403 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0403 fault typically range from around £13 to £348, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is connector egr corroded, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

description.fr: Le P0404 indique que le capteur de position de la vanne EGR renvoie des valeurs qui ne correspondent pas a la commande du calculateur. La vanne ne s'ouvre pas autant que demande ou au contraire s'ouvre trop. C'est souvent un signe que la vanne commence a coller a cause de la calamine, mais le mecanisme fonctionne encore partiellement. Le capteur de position integre a la vanne detecte que la position reelle ne correspond pas a la position commandee. Ce code est intermediaire entre un fonctionnement normal et une panne complete. Un nettoyage de la vanne peut resoudre le probleme si l'encrassement est la cause. Si le capteur lui-meme est defaillant, il faut remplacer la vanne complete.
description.en: When your car shows a P0404 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to egr circuit — range/performance. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.

fr.question: Le P0404 est-il urgent ?
fr.answer: Non, c'est un code de performance degradee. La vanne fonctionne encore mais pas parfaitement. C'est le bon moment pour la nettoyer avant qu'elle ne se bloque completement.

fr.question: Le nettoyage peut-il suffire ?
fr.answer: Dans beaucoup de cas oui. Si la vanne est juste encrassee, un bon nettoyage restaure son fonctionnement. C'est la premiere intervention a tenter.

fr.question: Le capteur de position est-il remplacable separement ?
fr.answer: Sur certaines vannes oui, sur d'autres il est integre. Consultez la documentation de votre vehicule. Souvent, remplacer la vanne complete est plus simple et plus fiable.

en.question: What does the P0404 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0404 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with egr circuit — range/performance. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

name.fr: Capteur de position EGR A — tension basse
name.en: EGR position sensor A — low voltage

description.fr: Le P0405 signale que le capteur de position de la vanne EGR envoie une tension trop basse. Le calculateur interprete cela comme la vanne etant en position fermee en permanence, meme quand il commande son ouverture. C'est souvent un court-circuit dans le cablage du capteur ou un capteur defaillant. La vanne elle-meme peut fonctionner mecaniquement mais le retour d'information est faux. Le calculateur ne sachant pas ou en est la vanne, il prefere la desactiver et mettre un defaut. L'impact sur la conduite est generalement minimal car le calculateur compense l'absence d'EGR, mais les emissions de NOx augmentent sensiblement.
description.en: A P0405 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with egr position sensor a — low voltage. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.

fr.question: L'EGR desactivee est-elle un probleme ?
fr.answer: Pas pour la conduite mais pour les emissions. Sans EGR, le moteur produit plus de NOx. C'est aussi un motif de refus au controle technique.

fr.question: Comment tester le capteur de position ?
fr.answer: Mesurez la tension de sortie avec un multimetre. Elle doit varier entre environ 0.5V (ferme) et 4.5V (ouvert). Si elle reste a 0V, le capteur ou le cablage est en cause.

fr.question: Peut-on conduire normalement sans EGR ?
fr.answer: Oui, le moteur fonctionne tres bien sans EGR. Certains disent meme mieux. Mais c'est illegal et polluant, donc il faut reparer.

en.question: What does the P0405 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0405 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with egr position sensor a — low voltage. This is a low-severity emissions fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0405 code?

en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0405 fault typically range from around £17 to £422, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty egr position sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: Yes, this code is very likely to cause an MOT failure. Emissions are tested during the MOT, and a fault in the emissions system typically results in elevated exhaust gas readings that exceed the legal limits.

description.fr: Le P0500 indique que le capteur de vitesse du vehicule (VSS) ne fonctionne plus correctement. Ce capteur informe le calculateur de la vitesse a laquelle le vehicule se deplace. Sans cette information, le compteur de vitesse ne fonctionne plus, la boite automatique ne change plus correctement les rapports et le regulateur de vitesse est desactive. Sur certains vehicules, l'ABS et l'ESP sont aussi affectes car ils utilisent cette information. Le capteur est generalement fixe sur la boite de vitesses ou le pont arriere. C'est un capteur magnetique qui lit les dents d'une roue dentee. La corrosion du connecteur et l'usure du capteur sont les causes les plus frequentes.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0500 relates to vehicle speed sensor — malfunction, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

fr.question: Mon compteur de vitesse ne marche plus, est-ce le P0500 ?
fr.answer: Tres probablement. Le capteur VSS alimente directement le compteur. Si le capteur est HS, le compteur reste a zero ou affiche des valeurs erratiques.

fr.question: La boite automatique reagit-elle au P0500 ?
fr.answer: Oui, la boite a besoin de la vitesse vehicule pour determiner quand changer de rapport. Sans cette info, elle peut rester bloquee en 2e ou 3e vitesse.

fr.question: Ce code affecte-t-il le kilometrage ?
fr.answer: Oui, si le capteur ne fonctionne plus, le compteur kilometrique ne tourne plus non plus. C'est une anomalie qui sera visible a la vente du vehicule.

en.question: What does the P0500 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0500 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with vehicle speed sensor — malfunction. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0500 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0500 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0500 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0500 fault typically range from around £17 to £302, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty vehicle speed sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0501 est plus subtil que le P0500 : le capteur de vitesse fonctionne mais ses valeurs sont incoherentes avec d'autres sources d'information comme les capteurs ABS de roue. Le calculateur detecte des ecarts significatifs entre la vitesse VSS et la vitesse calculee par les capteurs de roue. Cela peut venir d'un capteur fatigue dont le signal est affaibli, d'un entrefer trop important entre le capteur et la roue dentee, ou d'une roue dentee partiellement endommagee. Les pneus de taille incorrecte peuvent aussi fausser la comparaison si la taille n'est pas correctement programmee dans le calculateur. Le compteur fonctionne mais peut afficher une vitesse incorrecte.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0501 code, it is telling you there is a problem with vehicle speed sensor — range/performance. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.

fr.question: Des pneus trop grands peuvent-ils causer ce code ?
fr.answer: Oui, si les pneus sont significativement plus grands que l'origine, le rapport entre la vitesse VSS et la vitesse ABS ne correspond plus. Certains calculateurs detectent cet ecart.

fr.question: L'entrefer du capteur, c'est quoi ?
fr.answer: C'est la distance entre l'extremite du capteur magnetique et les dents de la roue dentee. Si cet ecart augmente (usure, desserrage), le signal s'affaiblit et devient erratique.

fr.question: Ce code peut-il causer des amendes pour exces de vitesse ?
fr.answer: Si le compteur affiche une vitesse inferieure a la realite, vous roulez plus vite que ce que vous pensez. C'est effectivement un risque.

en.question: What does the P0501 fault code mean?

name.fr: Systeme de controle du ralenti — regime inferieur au seuil
name.en: Idle control system — RPM lower than expected

description.fr: Le P0506 indique que le moteur tourne en dessous du regime de ralenti programme. Au lieu de 750-800 tours/minute, le moteur descend a 500-600 tours et risque de caler. Le calculateur essaie de remonter le regime en ouvrant la vanne de ralenti ou le papillon, mais n'y arrive pas suffisamment. Les causes classiques sont un boitier papillon encrasse qui ne laisse plus passer assez d'air, une vanne de ralenti bloquee en position basse, ou une charge electrique trop importante qui ralentit le moteur. La climatisation, les phares et la direction assistee electrique consomment de l'energie que le moteur doit compenser. Si le ralenti est trop faible, il ne compense pas et le moteur cale.
description.en: A P0506 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with idle control system — rpm lower than expected. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

fr.question: Mon moteur cale au feu rouge, est-ce le P0506 ?
fr.answer: C'est une possibilite. Un ralenti trop bas ne compense pas les charges electriques (clim, phares, direction) et le moteur cale. Verifiez l'etat du papillon en premier.

fr.question: La climatisation fait-elle caler le moteur ?
fr.answer: Si le ralenti est deja limite, l'enclenchement de la clim peut faire passer le moteur sous le seuil et provoquer un calage. Le calculateur devrait normalement remonter le regime a l'enclenchement de la clim.

fr.question: Nettoyer le papillon suffit-il ?
fr.answer: Souvent oui. Un papillon encrasse laisse passer moins d'air au ralenti. Un nettoyage avec un produit adapte restaure le passage d'air. N'oubliez pas le reapprentissage du ralenti apres.

en.question: What does the P0506 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0506 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with idle control system — rpm lower than expected. This is a low-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

name.fr: Systeme de controle du ralenti — circuit tension basse
name.en: Idle control system — low voltage circuit

description.fr: Le P0508 signale un probleme electrique sur le circuit de commande du systeme de ralenti. La tension est anormalement basse, ce qui peut indiquer un court-circuit dans le cablage de la vanne de ralenti ou du moteur pas a pas qui controle l'air au ralenti. Sur les vehicules avec papillon electronique, c'est le circuit de commande du moteur du papillon qui est concerne. Un connecteur corrode, un fil pince ou un composant interne en court-circuit sont les causes typiques. Le calculateur peut mettre le systeme en mode degrade avec un ralenti fixe qui n'est pas necessairement optimal pour toutes les conditions de charge.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0508 relates to idle control system — low voltage circuit, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

fr.question: Le moteur pas a pas, c'est quoi ?
fr.answer: C'est un petit moteur electrique qui controle l'ouverture d'un passage d'air parallele au papillon. Il permet au calculateur d'ajuster le debit d'air au ralenti sans toucher au papillon lui-meme.

fr.question: Quel est l'impact d'un ralenti non adaptatif ?
fr.answer: Le moteur tourne a un regime fixe qui ne s'ajuste plus aux conditions. Quand la clim s'enclenche ou que la direction est braquee, le regime ne monte pas et le moteur peut caler.

fr.question: Ce probleme est-il lie a la batterie ?
fr.answer: Une tension de batterie trop basse peut perturber les signaux electriques. Verifiez l'etat de la batterie et de l'alternateur avant de remplacer des composants.

en.question: What does the P0508 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0508 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with idle control system — low voltage circuit. This is a low-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.
