Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

fr.question: Tension basse signifie-t-elle haute pression ou basse pression ?
fr.answer: Cela depend du type de capteur. La plupart des capteurs MAP envoient une tension haute quand la pression est haute. Donc une tension basse correspond a une basse pression (forte depression).

fr.question: Comment verifier la tension de reference 5V ?
fr.answer: Avec un multimetre, mesurez entre le fil de reference et la masse du connecteur, cle de contact mise. Vous devez lire environ 5 volts. Si cette tension est absente, le calculateur ne fournit pas l'alimentation.

fr.question: Un capteur MAP peut-il etre nettoyé ?
fr.answer: Oui, de la condensation ou des depots dans le port de pression peuvent fausser la mesure. Un nettoyage delicat avec du nettoyant contacts peut aider.

description.fr: Le P0108 signale une tension trop elevee sur le capteur MAP, correspondant a une pression anormalement haute dans le collecteur d'admission. Sur un moteur atmospherique, cela ne devrait pas depasser la pression atmospherique au ralenti. Sur un turbo, la pression peut monter mais pas au-dela de la consigne. Un circuit ouvert dans le cablage (fil coupe) donne une tension haute. Un capteur defaillant ou une vraie surpression du turbo non controlee sont aussi des causes possibles. Le calculateur reagit en reduisant le carburant car il pense que le moteur est en pleine charge, ce qui peut creer un melange pauvre et dangereux pour le moteur.

name.en: Wiring MAP sensor in open circuit

fr.question: Une surpression turbo est-elle dangereuse ?
fr.answer: Oui, une surpression non controlee peut endommager le moteur : joints de culasse, pistons, soupapes. Le calculateur coupe normalement l'injection en cas de surpression extreme.

fr.question: Comment differencier un faux signal d'une vraie surpression ?
fr.answer: Comparez la pression MAP en temps reel avec un manometre externe. Si le capteur affiche 2 bars mais le manometre montre 1 bar, c'est le capteur. Si les deux concordent, c'est une vraie surpression.

fr.question: Le circuit ouvert donne-t-il une tension haute ?
fr.answer: Sur la plupart des capteurs MAP, oui. Le calculateur voit la tension monter a sa valeur de reference (5V) quand le fil de signal est coupe, ce qu'il interprete comme une pression maximale.

en.question: What does the P0108 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0108 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with map sensor — high voltage. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0108 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0108 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0108 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0108 fault typically range from around £17 to £434, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is wiring map sensor in open circuit, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Capteur de temperature d'air d'admission — circuit defaillant
name.en: Intake air temperature sensor — circuit fault

description.fr: Le P0110 est le code general du capteur IAT (Intake Air Temperature) signalant un dysfonctionnement de circuit. Ce code englobe les problemes de tension haute, basse et d'absence de signal. Le capteur mesure la temperature de l'air entrant dans le moteur pour ajuster le dosage carburant. L'air froid est plus dense que l'air chaud, donc le moteur a besoin de plus de carburant quand l'air est froid. Sans ce capteur, le calculateur utilise une valeur par defaut qui n'est pas optimale en toutes circonstances. Le capteur est souvent integre au debitmetre ou monte seul sur le conduit d'admission.
description.en: A P0110 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with intake air temperature sensor — circuit fault. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

name.fr: Capteur integre au MAF (MAF a remplacer)
name.en: Sensor integrated in MAF (MAF needs replacing)

fr.question: L'IAT est-il integre au debitmetre sur ma voiture ?
fr.answer: Sur beaucoup de vehicules modernes, oui. Le capteur IAT est integre au boitier du debitmetre MAF. Si l'IAT est defaillant, il faut parfois remplacer le MAF complet.

fr.question: Le dosage est-il vraiment affecte ?
fr.answer: Oui, mais moderement. La variation de temperature entre ete et hiver fait varier la densite de l'air d'environ 10-15%. Sans correction, le dosage est decale d'autant.

fr.question: Ce capteur est-il le meme que celui de temperature exterieure ?
fr.answer: Non, le capteur IAT mesure l'air dans le conduit d'admission (qui peut etre chauffe par le turbo ou le moteur). Le capteur de temperature exterieure est dans le pare-chocs.

en.question: What does the P0110 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0110 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with intake air temperature sensor — circuit fault. This is a low-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0110 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0110 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0110 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0110 fault typically range from around £9 to £305, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is faulty intake air temperature sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0116 signale que le capteur de temperature du liquide de refroidissement (ECT) donne des valeurs incoherentes avec les conditions de fonctionnement. Par exemple, le capteur peut indiquer que le moteur est encore froid apres 20 minutes de conduite, ou que la temperature change trop brusquement. Le calculateur compare la temperature ECT avec d'autres informations comme la temperature d'air, le temps de fonctionnement et la charge moteur. Si la courbe de temperature ne correspond pas au modele attendu, ce code est enregistre. Un capteur dont la caracteristique a derive avec l'age est la cause la plus frequente. Un thermostat partiellement bloque peut aussi provoquer une courbe de temperature anormale.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0116 relates to coolant temperature sensor — range/performance, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

name.fr: Bulle d'air dans le circuit de refroidissement

fr.question: La temperature varie bizarrement sur mon tableau de bord, c'est ca ?
fr.answer: C'est possible. Un capteur dont la caracteristique a derive peut envoyer des valeurs qui montent et descendent de maniere illogique.

fr.question: Une bulle d'air peut-elle fausser la temperature ?
fr.answer: Oui, si une bulle d'air passe devant le capteur ECT, la temperature chute brutalement puis remonte. C'est frequent apres un remplissage de liquide de refroidissement mal purge.

fr.question: Le thermostat et le capteur ECT sont-ils au meme endroit ?
fr.answer: Souvent oui, le capteur ECT est visse dans le boitier de thermostat ou a proximite. Quand vous remplacez le thermostat, c'est l'occasion de verifier le capteur aussi.

en.question: What does the P0116 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0116 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with coolant temperature sensor — range/performance. This is a low-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0116 code?

However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0116 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0116 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0116 fault typically range from around £13 to £149, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is ageing coolant temperature sensor, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.fr: Temperature liquide de refroidissement insuffisante pour boucle fermee
name.en: Insufficient coolant temperature for closed-loop operation

description.fr: Le P0125 indique que la temperature du moteur ne monte pas assez vite pour que le calculateur passe en boucle fermee dans un delai raisonnable. Apres le demarrage a froid, le calculateur attend que la temperature atteigne environ 60-70 degres pour activer la regulation fine du melange par la sonde lambda. Si cette temperature n'est pas atteinte dans les 5 a 10 minutes prevues, le P0125 est stocke. C'est un code tres similaire au P0128 mais specifique a la transition vers la boucle fermee. Le thermostat bloque ouvert reste la cause principale. L'impact est une surconsommation prolongee au demarrage et des emissions elevees.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0125 code, it is telling you there is a problem with insufficient coolant temperature for closed-loop operation. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.

en: Prolonged fuel consumption increase after starting

fr.question: Quelle difference entre P0125 et P0128 ?
fr.answer: Le P0125 concerne specifiquement le delai pour atteindre la temperature de boucle fermee. Le P0128 est plus general et concerne la temperature globale du moteur. Les causes sont souvent les memes.

fr.question: Qu'est-ce que la boucle fermee ?
fr.answer: En boucle fermee, le calculateur ajuste le melange en temps reel grace a la sonde lambda. Avant d'atteindre cette temperature, il fonctionne avec des valeurs pre-programmees moins precises.

fr.question: Le chauffage qui ne chauffe pas est-il lie ?
fr.answer: Oui, si le moteur ne monte pas en temperature, le liquide de refroidissement qui passe dans le radiateur de chauffage est tiede au lieu d'etre chaud. Le chauffage ne donne pas son plein rendement.

en.question: What does the P0125 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0125 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with insufficient coolant temperature for closed-loop operation. This is a low-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0125 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a low-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: How much does P0125 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0125 fault typically range from around £13 to £216, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is thermostat stuck open, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0217 est un code d'urgence qui signifie que le moteur a atteint une temperature dangereusement elevee, au-dela du seuil critique defini par le constructeur (generalement 120-130 degres pour le liquide de refroidissement). A cette temperature, les joints, les segments et meme le bloc moteur commencent a souffrir. Le calculateur peut reduire la puissance ou couper certains cylindres pour tenter de faire baisser la temperature. Si vous voyez ce code ou si votre jauge de temperature est dans le rouge, arretez-vous immediatement et coupez le moteur. Les causes sont un manque de liquide de refroidissement, un thermostat bloque ferme, des ventilateurs qui ne fonctionnent pas, une pompe a eau defaillante ou un joint de culasse qui commence a lacher.
description.en: A P0217 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with engine overheating detected. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

fr.question: Je vois de la vapeur sous le capot, que faire ?
fr.answer: Arretez-vous immediatement de maniere securisee. Ne tentez PAS d'ouvrir le bouchon de radiateur — le liquide est sous pression et brulant. Attendez au moins 30 minutes que le moteur refroidisse.

fr.question: La surchauffe peut-elle casser le moteur ?
fr.answer: Oui, une surchauffe prolongee deforme la culasse, detruit le joint de culasse et peut gripper les pistons. Un seul episode de surchauffe severe peut condamner un moteur.

fr.question: Comment prevenir la surchauffe ?
fr.answer: Verifiez regulierement le niveau de liquide de refroidissement. Faites remplacer le thermostat et la pompe a eau selon les preconisations du constructeur. En cas de montee de temperature anormale, arretez-vous avant que le voyant ne passe au rouge.

en.question: What does the P0217 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0217 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with engine overheating detected. This is a critical-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0217 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will P0217 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0217 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0217 fault typically range from around £9 to £434, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is low coolant level, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

description.fr: Le P0234 signale que la pression du turbo a depasse la consigne maximale definie par le constructeur. C'est un code de protection critique car une surpression peut endommager gravement le moteur. Les causes sont souvent mecaniques : wastegate bloquee fermee, electrovanne de commande de wastegate defaillante, ou conduit de depression fissure. Sur les turbos a geometrie variable, les ailettes peuvent se bloquer en position fermee a cause de la calamine. Le calculateur reagit en coupant l'injection ou en ouvrant le papillon pour limiter la puissance. Si le code apparait regulierement, ne continuez pas a solliciter le moteur en attendant la reparation.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0234 relates to turbocharger over-boost detected, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

fr.question: La coupure de puissance est-elle normale ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est une mesure de protection du calculateur. Il coupe l'injection pour empecher le turbo de monter plus en pression. C'est frustrant mais ca sauve le moteur.

fr.question: La geometrie variable peut-elle se debloquer ?
fr.answer: Parfois avec un bon decalaminage ou en faisant varier les regimes sur autoroute. Mais si les ailettes sont serieusement encrassees, un demontage du turbo est necessaire.

fr.question: Le turbo peut-il exploser en surpression ?
fr.answer: Le turbo lui-meme resiste generalement, mais le moteur en dessous peut subir des dommages : joints, pistons, bielles. Le moteur est le maillon faible dans l'equation.

en.question: What does the P0234 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0234 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with turbocharger over-boost detected. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0234 code?
en.answer: You can drive short distances with this code, but it is advisable to get it checked soon. This is a high-severity fault that could worsen over time. Avoid long motorway journeys until a mechanic has had a look, and keep an eye on your temperature gauge and warning lights.

en.question: Will P0234 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0234 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0234 fault typically range from around £35 to £690, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is wastegate stuck closed, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

description.fr: Le P0299 est l'inverse du P0234 : le turbo ne produit pas assez de pression. Le calculateur commande un certain niveau de suralimentation mais la pression mesuree dans le collecteur est inferieure a la consigne. Les causes les plus frequentes sont une wastegate qui reste ouverte, une fuite sur le circuit de surpression (tuyau d'intercooler debranche, collier desserre) ou un turbo dont les ailettes sont usees et ne compriment plus efficacement l'air. Un mode degrade limite la puissance pour proteger le turbo. La perte de puissance est le symptome principal : le vehicule peine dans les cotes et les accelerations sont molles.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0299 code, it is telling you there is a problem with turbocharger under-boost detected. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.

fr.question: J'entends un sifflement sous le capot, est-ce une fuite ?
fr.answer: Tres probablement. Un tuyau d'intercooler qui s'est debranche ou un collier desserre laisse s'echapper l'air sous pression avec un sifflement caractéristique. C'est la cause la plus simple et la moins chere.

fr.question: Comment verifier si le turbo est use ?
fr.answer: Demontez le tuyau d'admission et verifiez le jeu de l'arbre du turbo en le faisant bouger lateralement. Un jeu visible signifie que les paliers sont uses. Les aubes ne doivent pas toucher le carter.

fr.question: Un tuyau debranche peut-il vraiment faire perdre autant de puissance ?
fr.answer: Absolument. L'air comprime par le turbo s'echappe au lieu d'entrer dans le moteur. Le turbo tourne pour rien et le moteur ne recoit pas la surpression. L'impact est immediat et tres perceptible.

en.question: What does the P0299 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0299 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with turbocharger under-boost detected. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0299 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

description.fr: Le P0305 pointe le cylindre 5, present uniquement sur les moteurs 5, 6, 8 cylindres ou plus. Ce cylindre ne brule pas correctement le melange air-carburant, causant des vibrations et une perte de puissance. Sur un V6 ou V8, le cylindre 5 fait partie de la banque 2. Les causes sont les memes que pour les cylindres 1 a 4 : bougie, bobine, injecteur ou probleme de compression. Sur les moteurs en V, l'acces aux bougies et bobines du cote arriere peut etre plus difficile, ce qui rend les interventions plus couteuses en main d'oeuvre. Le diagnostic par permutation reste la methode la plus efficace pour identifier le composant defaillant.
description.en: A P0305 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with misfire detected — cylinder 5. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

fr.question: Le cylindre 5 est-il plus cher a reparer ?
fr.answer: Sur les moteurs en V, les cylindres cote cloison de feu (arriere) sont plus difficiles d'acces. La main d'oeuvre peut etre plus elevee meme si les pieces sont au meme prix.

fr.question: Mon V6 vibre, est-ce normal ?
fr.answer: Un V6 vibre naturellement un peu plus qu'un 4 cylindres a cause de son architecture. Mais des vibrations excessives ou un changement soudain indiquent un probleme comme un rate d'allumage.

fr.question: Faut-il changer toutes les bougies d'un V6 en meme temps ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est recommande. Sur un V6, changer les 6 bougies en meme temps assure un equilibre de combustion et evite de refaire la meme intervention 6 mois plus tard pour les autres.

en.question: What does the P0305 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0305 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with misfire detected — cylinder 5. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0305 code?

The most common fix is spark plug cylinder 5, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0306 concerne le cylindre 6, typiquement le dernier cylindre sur un moteur 6 cylindres en ligne ou le troisieme de la banque 2 sur un V6. Ce cylindre est souvent le plus eloigne du capteur de temperature d'eau et peut etre le plus expose a la chaleur. Sur les moteurs en ligne 6 cylindres, c'est le cylindre le plus pres du volant moteur. Les vibrations du rate d'allumage sur ce cylindre sont transmises directement au volant moteur et a la boite de vitesses, ce qui peut les rendre plus perceptibles dans la pedale d'embrayage ou le levier de vitesses. Le diagnostic est identique aux autres cylindres : bougie, bobine, injecteur puis compression.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0306 relates to misfire detected — cylinder 6, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

fr.question: Les vibrations dans la pedale sont-elles liees au rate ?
fr.answer: Sur un 6 cylindres en ligne, le cylindre 6 est pres de la boite de vitesses. Un rate sur ce cylindre transmet ses vibrations directement via le volant moteur et l'embrayage.

fr.question: Un rate sur un seul cylindre d'un 6 est-il plus discret que sur un 4 ?
fr.answer: Oui, perdre un cylindre sur six represente 17% de perte de puissance, contre 25% sur un 4 cylindres. Les vibrations sont aussi moins prononcees car les 5 cylindres restants compensent mieux.

fr.question: Comment identifier le cylindre 6 sur un V6 ?
fr.answer: L'ordre de numerotation varie selon les constructeurs. Generalement, banque 1 = cylindres 1-3 et banque 2 = cylindres 4-6. Consultez le manuel de votre vehicule pour l'ordre exact.

en.question: What does the P0306 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0306 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with misfire detected — cylinder 6. This is a medium-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0306 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0306 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0306 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0306 fault typically range from around £9 to £1249, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is spark plug cylinder 6, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

description.fr: Le P0336 signale que le signal du capteur de vilebrequin est present mais de qualite degradee. Le calculateur detecte des irregularites dans le signal : dents manquantes mal lues, amplitude insuffisante ou signal erratique. Cela peut etre du a un entrefer trop grand entre le capteur et la roue dentee, un capteur dont le signal s'affaiblit ou une roue dentee partiellement endommagee. Le moteur peut presenter des hesitations, des a-coups ou des difficult-es a maintenir un regime stable. Ce code est souvent intermittent au debut et peut preceder un P0335 complet si le capteur continue a se degrader. Remplacez le capteur preventivellement si vous observez ce code.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0336 code, it is telling you there is a problem with crankshaft position sensor — range/performance. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.

fr.question: Ce code peut-il etre intermittent ?
fr.answer: Oui, c'est meme frequent. Le capteur peut fonctionner a froid mais perdre le signal a chaud, ou inversement. L'intermittence rend le diagnostic plus complexe.

fr.question: L'entrefer du capteur peut-il se regler ?
fr.answer: Sur certains vehicules, le capteur est reglable avec des cales. Sur d'autres, l'entrefer est determine par le logement du capteur. Verifiez que le capteur est bien enfonce et correctement fixe.

fr.question: Dois-je remplacer le capteur meme si le probleme est intermittent ?
fr.answer: Oui, un capteur qui commence a donner des signes de faiblesse finira par lacher completement. Mieux vaut le remplacer preventivellement que de tomber en panne sur l'autoroute.

name.fr: Correlation vilebrequin/arbre cames banque 2 capteur A

description.fr: Le P0018 detecte un decalage entre la position du vilebrequin et l'arbre a cames d'admission cote banque 2, specifique aux moteurs en V. Cela indique un calage variable bloque, une chaine etiree ou un capteur defaillant sur la banque 2. Le VVT utilise la pression d'huile pour ajuster la position de l'arbre a cames. Une huile degradee ou un niveau insuffisant sont des causes frequentes. Sur certains V6, les chaines de distribution arrivent en fin de vie autour de 150 000 km et commencent a s'etirer.
description.en: A P0018 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with crankshaft/camshaft correlation — bank 2 sensor a. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

fr.question: Combien coute la reparation ?

name.fr: Correlation vilebrequin/arbre cames banque 2 capteur B

description.fr: Le P0019 concerne la correlation entre le vilebrequin et l'arbre a cames d'echappement de la banque 2. Ce code est specifique aux moteurs V6/V8 equipes de double VVT. Si ce code accompagne un P0018, les deux arbres a cames de la banque 2 sont decales, ce qui pointe fortement vers un probleme de distribution (chaine ou tendeur) plutot que vers les actuateurs VVT individuels. Le diagnostic requiert la verification du calage de la distribution et de l'etat des chaines. Un tendeur de chaine use peut provoquer un decalage sans que la chaine soit etiree.

name.fr: Actuateur position arbre cames A circuit banque 2

description.fr: Le P0020 est l'equivalent du P0010 pour la banque 2. L'actuateur de calage variable de l'arbre a cames d'admission du cote banque 2 a un probleme de circuit electrique. L'electrovanne qui controle le calage ne recoit pas la commande correctement. Verifiez d'abord le connecteur et le cablage qui peuvent etre endommages par la chaleur ou les vibrations du moteur. Sur les moteurs en V, l'acces aux composants de la banque 2 (cote cloison pare-feu) est souvent plus difficile, ce qui augmente le temps de main d'oeuvre.

name.fr: Calage arbre cames A en avance banque 2

description.fr: Le P0021 signale un calage d'arbre a cames d'admission trop avance sur la banque 2. Les causes et symptomes sont symetriques au P0011 mais localises sur l'autre banque du moteur en V. L'huile moteur degradee affecte les deux banques simultanement, donc si vous avez P0011 et P0021 ensemble, une vidange est la premiere intervention. Si un seul des deux codes est present, le probleme est localise sur la banque concernee : electrovanne, actuateur ou passage hydraulique bouche. Verifiez aussi que l'huile est au bon niveau.

name.fr: Calage arbre cames A en retard banque 2

description.fr: Le P0022 indique que l'arbre a cames d'admission de la banque 2 est en retard par rapport a la consigne. Un calage retarde reduit le remplissage des cylindres et diminue la puissance, surtout a haut regime. Combine au P0012, ce code pointe vers un probleme d'huile generalise. Seul, il indique un probleme specifique a la banque 2 du moteur. Le decalaminage et une vidange avec huile de qualite constituent la premiere approche. Si le probleme persiste, l'electrovanne et l'actuateur de la banque 2 doivent etre testes individuellement.

name.fr: Chauffage sonde lambda amont circuit banque 1 capteur 1
name.en: Upstream lambda sensor heater circuit — bank 1 sensor 1

description.fr: Le P0030 signale un probleme sur le circuit de chauffage de la sonde lambda amont banque 1. Le chauffage permet a la sonde d'atteindre rapidement sa temperature de fonctionnement de 300 degres. Ce code est similaire au P0135 mais provient d'un constructeur utilisant un systeme de codification different. L'element chauffant integre a la sonde peut etre grille, ou le circuit d'alimentation est coupe. Le fusible, le relais et le cablage sont a verifier avant de remplacer la sonde. L'impact est une boucle ouverte prolongee au demarrage avec surconsommation.
description.en: When your car shows a P0030 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to upstream lambda sensor heater circuit — bank 1 sensor 1. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.

name.en: Downstream lambda sensor heater circuit — bank 1 sensor 2

description.fr: Le P0036 concerne le chauffage de la sonde lambda aval banque 1 (apres le catalyseur). L'element chauffant de cette sonde est defaillant, ce qui l'empeche d'atteindre sa temperature de fonctionnement rapidement. La sonde aval surveille l'efficacite du catalyseur. Sans chauffage, cette surveillance est retardee apres chaque demarrage. L'impact sur la conduite est negligeable puisque la sonde aval ne participe pas au reglage du melange. Le remplacement de la sonde complete est la solution standard car l'element chauffant n'est pas reparable separement.
description.en: A P0036 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with downstream lambda sensor heater circuit — bank 1 sensor 2. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.

description.fr: Le P0120 est le code general du capteur de position du papillon des gaz (TPS) signalant un dysfonctionnement de circuit. Ce capteur indique au calculateur l'ouverture du papillon, c'est-a-dire la demande de puissance du conducteur. Un defaut de circuit peut provenir d'une tension de reference absente, d'un signal hors plage, ou d'une incoherence avec le capteur de pedale d'accelerateur. Le papillon electronique utilise deux capteurs redondants pour la securite. Si un seul est defaillant, le second prend le relais. Si les deux sont incoherents, le mode degrade s'active avec puissance tres reduite.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0120 relates to throttle position sensor a — circuit, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

name.fr: Capteur position papillon A tension haute
name.en: Throttle position sensor A — high voltage

description.fr: Le P0123 indique que le capteur A du papillon des gaz envoie une tension anormalement haute, au-dessus de 4.5 volts environ. Le calculateur interprete cela comme un papillon grand ouvert en permanence, ce qui est evidemment incorrect au ralenti. Un circuit ouvert dans le fil de masse du capteur, un court-circuit vers la tension de reference, ou un capteur dont la piste resistive est coupee sont les causes typiques. Le mode degrade limite la puissance pour eviter une acceleration incontrole. La situation est consideree comme potentiellement dangereuse car une acceleration involontaire est possible si le calculateur ne compense pas.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0123 code, it is telling you there is a problem with throttle position sensor a — high voltage. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.

name.fr: Sonde lambda amont tension haute banque 1

description.fr: Le P0132 signale que la sonde lambda amont envoie une tension constamment haute, au-dessus de 0.9V. Cela indique soit un melange reellement trop riche que la sonde detecte correctement, soit une sonde en court-circuit qui renvoie toujours une tension elevee. Le calculateur essaie de compenser en appauvrissant le melange, mais si la sonde est defaillante, cette correction est inutile et degrade la combustion. Verifiez les corrections carburant : si elles sont tres negatives et que le moteur tourne bien, c'est la sonde qui ment. Si le melange est vraiment riche, cherchez un injecteur qui fuit ou un regulateur de pression defaillant.

description.fr: Le P0150 est l'equivalent du P0130 pour la banque 2 du moteur. La sonde lambda qui controle le melange air-carburant de la banque 2 presente un defaut de circuit. Sur les V6 et V8, chaque banque a sa propre sonde amont pour regler independamment le melange. Un defaut sur cette sonde met la banque 2 en boucle ouverte, augmentant la consommation et les emissions de ce cote du moteur. Le diagnostic est identique : verifier cablage, connecteur et resistance de la sonde. Le remplacement est souvent la solution la plus fiable pour un composant de plus de 100 000 km.
description.en: The P0150 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with upstream lambda sensor — circuit (bank 2). Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.

description.fr: Le P0155 concerne le chauffage de la sonde lambda amont de la banque 2. L'element chauffant est defaillant, empechant la sonde d'atteindre rapidement sa temperature de fonctionnement apres un demarrage a froid. La banque 2 du moteur fonctionne en boucle ouverte plus longtemps que prevu, augmentant la consommation et les emissions de ce cote. Le fusible de chauffage est parfois commun aux sondes de la banque 2 — verifiez-le en priorite. Le remplacement de la sonde complete est la solution standard, comme pour le P0135 sur la banque 1.
description.en: When your car shows a P0155 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to upstream lambda sensor heater — circuit (bank 2). Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.

description.fr: Le P0156 signale un defaut de circuit sur la sonde lambda aval de la banque 2, celle qui surveille le catalyseur cote banque 2. Cette sonde n'influence pas le reglage du melange mais verifie que le catalyseur de la banque 2 convertit correctement les polluants. Un defaut empeche cette surveillance et peut masquer un probleme de catalyseur. Le remplacement est similaire a celui de la sonde aval banque 1. Verifiez qu'il n'y a pas de fuite d'echappement entre le catalyseur et la sonde qui fausserait la mesure.

description.fr: Le P0215 concerne l'electrovanne d'arret du moteur, principalement sur les vehicules diesel. Cette vanne coupe l'alimentation en carburant pour arreter le moteur quand vous tournez la cle. Si elle est defaillante, le moteur peut refuser de s'arreter ou au contraire s'arreter inopinement. Sur les diesels anciens avec pompe mecanique, cette vanne est la seule facon d'arreter le moteur. Un defaut est donc potentiellement dangereux. Verifiez le circuit electrique de la vanne et son fonctionnement mecanique. Le remplacement est relativement simple.

fr.answer: Non, il est recommande de ne pas rouler avec ce code actif. Faites remorquer votre vehicule jusqu'au garage le plus proche.

en.question: What does the P0215 fault code mean?
en.answer: The P0215 code means your car's computer has detected a problem with engine shut-off solenoid — malfunction. This is a high-severity engine fault. Your mechanic can use an OBD2 diagnostic scanner to investigate further and identify the specific cause.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0215 code?
en.answer: It is not recommended to drive with this fault code active. The issue it indicates could compromise your safety or cause serious damage to the vehicle. If possible, have the car recovered to a garage rather than driving it there.

en.question: Will P0215 fail my MOT?
en.answer: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

en.question: How much does P0215 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0215 fault typically range from around £13 to £173, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is failed fuel shut-off solenoid, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

description.fr: Le P0216 signale que l'avance a l'injection est en dehors des limites definies par le constructeur. Sur les moteurs diesel, le moment precis ou le carburant est injecte est crucial pour l'efficacite et les emissions. Une avance trop precoce provoque du cliquetis diesel et des contraintes mecaniques, trop tardive reduit la puissance et augmente la fumee. Sur les moteurs a pompe distributrice, l'avance est mecaniquement controlee et peut se deregler. Sur les common rail, c'est un probleme de capteur, de calculateur ou d'injecteur. Ce code necessite un diagnostic professionnel avec un outil capable de mesurer l'avance en temps reel.
description.en: A P0216 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with injection timing out of specification. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

motFail: This code may cause an MOT failure if it results in excessive emissions or visible smoke. The engine warning light being illuminated is not an automatic MOT fail in the UK, but the underlying fault could affect emissions readings.

description.fr: Le P0221 signale que les performances du capteur de position du papillon B sont degradees. Le signal est present mais ses valeurs sont incoherentes avec le capteur A ou avec d'autres parametres moteur. Un encrassement du boitier papillon peut causer une friction qui perturbe le mouvement du volet et les lectures des capteurs. Sur les vehicules avec papillon electronique, une discordance prolongee entre les capteurs A et B declenche le mode degrade par securite. Un nettoyage du papillon suivi d'un reapprentissage du ralenti est souvent la premiere etape. Si le probleme persiste, le boitier papillon complet doit etre remplace.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0221 relates to throttle position sensor b — range/performance, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

name.fr: Capteur position papillon B tension haute
name.en: Throttle position sensor B — high voltage

description.fr: Le P0223 indique une tension trop elevee sur le capteur B du papillon des gaz. Le calculateur recoit un signal qui suggere que le papillon est grand ouvert alors que ce n'est pas le cas. C'est souvent un probleme de cablage en circuit ouvert ou un capteur dont la piste resistive est endommagee. Le mode degrade s'active immediatement car une discordance entre les capteurs represente un risque de securite. Si les deux capteurs A et B montrent des tensions elevees, le boitier papillon est tres probablement en cause. Si seul le B est haut, verifiez le cablage de ce capteur specifique.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0223 code, it is telling you there is a problem with throttle position sensor b — high voltage. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.

name.fr: Cablage capteur B en circuit ouvert
name.en: Wiring sensor B in open circuit

name.en: Turbo boost pressure sensor A — circuit

description.fr: Le P0235 signale un defaut sur le circuit du capteur de pression du turbocompresseur. Ce capteur mesure la pression de suralimentation dans le collecteur d'admission pour que le calculateur puisse controler la wastegate ou la geometrie variable. Sans ce signal, le calculateur ne peut pas regler correctement la pression du turbo et passe en mode degrade avec pression fixe reduite. Le capteur peut etre monte directement sur le collecteur ou relie par un tuyau de depression. Les causes incluent un capteur defaillant, un connecteur corrode ou un tuyau de reference bouche par de l'huile ou de la condensation.
description.en: A P0235 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with turbo boost pressure sensor a — circuit. name.en: Turbo boost pressure sensor A — range/performance

description.fr: Le P0236 indique que le capteur de pression turbo fonctionne mais donne des valeurs incoherentes. Le calculateur compare la pression mesuree avec la pression commandee et detecte des ecarts anormaux. Cela peut signifier que le capteur derive, que la pression reelle n'est pas celle attendue, ou qu'une fuite dans le circuit de surpression fausse la mesure. Avant de remplacer le capteur, verifiez l'integrite des tuyaux d'intercooler et les colliers de serrage. Une fuite d'air comprime donne une pression mesuree inferieure a la pression produite par le turbo, provoquant un ecart avec la consigne.

name.fr: Capteur pression turbo A tension basse
name.en: Turbo boost pressure sensor A — low voltage

description.fr: Le P0237 signale une tension basse du capteur de pression turbo, interpretee comme une pression tres faible dans le collecteur. Un court-circuit dans le cablage ou un capteur en defaut interne sont les causes electricques principales. Si la pression reelle est normale mais le capteur lit bas, le calculateur augmentera la consigne de turbo pour compenser, risquant une surpression reelle. C'est pourquoi ce code met souvent le turbo en mode degrade par precaution. Verifiez le connecteur, le cablage et mesurez la tension de reference de 5V avant de remplacer le capteur.

name.fr: Capteur pression turbo A tension haute
name.en: Turbo boost pressure sensor A — high voltage

description.fr: Le P0238 indique une tension haute du capteur de pression turbo, correspondant a une pression anormalement elevee. Si c'est un faux signal, le calculateur reduce la commande de turbo, limitant la puissance. Si c'est une vraie surpression, c'est un probleme mecanique du turbo a traiter en urgence. Un cablage en circuit ouvert donne une tension maximale que le calculateur interprete comme une pression extreme. Differencier un probleme electrique d'une vraie surpression est essentiel pour le diagnostic. Un manometre externe en parallele du capteur electronique permet de trancher.

name.en: Fuel injector cylinder 1 — low voltage circuit

description.fr: Le P0261 indique une tension de commande trop basse sur l'injecteur du cylindre 1. Le calculateur detecte un court-circuit dans le circuit de l'injecteur, ce qui empeche une injection correcte. L'injecteur peut etre en court-circuit interne, le cablage peut toucher la masse, ou le connecteur peut etre infiltre par de l'eau ou de l'huile. Ce code est plus specifique que le P0201 car il precise la nature du defaut electrique. Debranchez le connecteur et mesurez la resistance de l'injecteur. Un court-circuit donne une resistance proche de zero ohm, confirmant le diagnostic.

en.question: Can I drive with a P0261 code?
en.answer: Yes, you can generally continue driving with this code. It is a medium-severity fault that should not cause immediate danger. However, you may notice some changes in performance or fuel consumption. Book a diagnostic appointment when convenient — the sooner you get it sorted, the less likely it is to cause further issues.

en.question: Will P0261 fail my MOT?
en.answer: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

en.question: How much does P0261 repair cost in the UK?
en.answer: In the UK, repair costs for a P0261 fault typically range from around £8 to £300, depending on the root cause and your vehicle's make and model. The most common fix is fuel injector cylinder 1 short circuit, but a proper diagnostic is needed to confirm exactly what needs doing. Labour rates vary across the country, with London and the South East generally being more expensive than other regions.

motFail: The engine warning light alone does not cause an automatic MOT failure in the UK. However, if this fault affects exhaust emissions or causes visible smoke, it could result in a fail on the emissions test.

name.en: Fuel injector cylinder 1 — high voltage circuit

description.fr: Le P0262 signale une tension trop haute sur le circuit de l'injecteur du cylindre 1, typiquement un circuit ouvert. L'injecteur ne recoit pas de courant car le fil est coupe ou le connecteur est debranche. Le cylindre 1 ne recoit aucun carburant et le moteur tourne sur les cylindres restants. Verifiez le connecteur de l'injecteur en premier — il peut s'etre debranche par les vibrations. Ensuite testez la resistance de l'injecteur : une valeur infinie confirme un circuit ouvert interne. Le remplacement de l'injecteur ou la reparation du cablage resolvent le probleme.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0262 code, it is telling you there is a problem with fuel injector cylinder 1 — high voltage circuit. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.

fr.question: Ce code est-il grave ?
fr.answer: La gravite depend du contexte. Un diagnostic professionnel avec lecture des donnees en temps reel est recommande pour evaluer la situation exacte de votre vehicule.

fr.question: Combien coute la reparation ?
fr.answer: Les couts varient selon la cause exacte et le vehicule. Consultez les fourchettes de prix indiquees pour chaque cause possible, et demandez plusieurs devis.

fr.question: Puis-je rouler avec ce code ?
fr.answer: Oui, la conduite reste possible mais faites diagnostiquer et reparer dans un delai raisonnable pour eviter que le probleme ne s'aggrave.

description.fr: Le P0327 indique que le signal du capteur de cliquetis est trop faible. Le capteur piezoelectrique ne genere pas assez de tension pour que le calculateur puisse detecter les vibrations de detonation. Un mauvais serrage du capteur sur le bloc, un capteur fatigue ou un cablage avec resistance elevee sont les causes typiques. Le calculateur retarde l'avance d'allumage par precaution, ce qui reduit les performances. Le couple de serrage du capteur est critique : trop serre, il est ecrase ; pas assez, il ne capte pas les vibrations. Consultez les specifications pour le couple exact.
description.en: A P0327 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with knock sensor bank 1 — low voltage. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

description.fr: Le P0328 signale une tension anormalement elevee du capteur de cliquetis. Cela peut indiquer un vrai cliquetis severe (detonation) ou un capteur qui genere un signal parasite. Un support moteur casse qui transmet des vibrations mecaniques au capteur peut aussi produire un faux signal. Des bougies non adaptees, un indice d'octane trop bas ou une avance d'allumage incorrecte sont des causes reelles de cliquetis. Le calculateur retarde fortement l'avance d'allumage, reduisant significativement les performances. Verifiez d'abord l'octane du carburant et l'etat des bougies.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0328 relates to knock sensor bank 1 — high voltage, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

description.fr: Le P0330 concerne le capteur de cliquetis de la banque 2, present uniquement sur les moteurs en V ou boxer. Ce capteur surveille les detonations du cote de la banque 2 de maniere independante. Un defaut sur ce capteur desactive la protection antidetonation de cette banque, exposant les cylindres concernes a des dommages potentiels si du cliquetis se produit. Les causes et le diagnostic sont identiques au P0325 mais localises sur l'autre cote du moteur. Le couple de serrage et la position du capteur sur le bloc sont les premiers points a verifier.

description.fr: Le P0341 signale que le capteur d'arbre a cames fonctionne mais son signal est degradé ou decale par rapport aux attentes. Le calculateur detecte des irregularites dans le timing du signal par rapport au capteur de vilebrequin. Cela peut indiquer un systeme VVT qui repond mal, une chaine de distribution qui commence a s'etirer, ou un capteur dont le signal s'affaiblit. Ce code est souvent intermittent au debut et peut ne se manifester qu'a froid ou qu'a chaud. Surveillez l'evolution car il peut preceder des codes plus graves comme le P0016.

name.fr: Capteur arbre a cames tension basse

description.fr: Le P0342 indique une tension basse sur le capteur d'arbre a cames, generalement un court-circuit dans le cablage ou le capteur. Le calculateur ne recoit qu'un signal bas permanent au lieu des impulsions attendues. Sur certains moteurs, le demarrage devient impossible car le calculateur a besoin de ce signal pour synchroniser l'injection. Sur d'autres, le moteur demarre en utilisant uniquement le capteur de vilebrequin mais avec un allumage moins precis. Verifiez le connecteur du capteur, le cablage et l'alimentation avant de remplacer le capteur lui-meme.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0342 relates to camshaft position sensor — low voltage, which is a fault within the engine management system. name.fr: Capteur arbre a cames tension haute

description.fr: Le P0343 signale une tension haute sur le capteur d'arbre a cames, correspondant a un circuit ouvert. Le fil de signal est coupe ou le connecteur est debranche. Le calculateur ne recoit aucun signal valide et le moteur peut refuser de demarrer sur certains vehicules. Sur d'autres, il fonctionne en mode degrade avec le seul capteur de vilebrequin. Un rongeur qui a grignote un fil, un connecteur arrache lors d'un entretien, ou un capteur dont la connexion interne est coupee sont les causes typiques. L'inspection visuelle du cablage est la premiere etape.

description.fr: Le P0351 signale un defaut sur le circuit primaire de la bobine d'allumage A (cylindre 1 sur la plupart des moteurs). Le calculateur detecte que le courant dans le circuit primaire de la bobine n'est pas conforme aux attentes. La bobine peut etre en court-circuit ou en circuit ouvert, le connecteur peut etre defaillant, ou le driver de commande dans le calculateur est endommage. Ce code est plus precis que le P0301 car il pointe directement la bobine plutot que le cylindre. Le remplacement de la bobine est la solution la plus courante et la moins couteuse.

description.fr: Le P0352 concerne la bobine d'allumage B, generalement celle du cylindre 2. Le circuit primaire de cette bobine presente un defaut electrique. Les bobines d'allumage modernes sont des composants individuels montes directement sur la bougie (bobine crayon). Elles chauffent beaucoup et les chocs thermiques repetitifs les usent avec le temps. Si une bobine est en panne, le cylindre correspondant ne recoit plus d'etincelle et le carburant non brule finit dans le catalyseur. Remplacez la bobine defaillante et verifiez l'etat de la bougie correspondante qui a pu souffrir de l'absence d'etincelle.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0352 relates to ignition coil b — primary circuit, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

description.fr: Le P0353 signale un defaut du circuit primaire de la bobine C, cylindre 3. Sur un moteur 4 cylindres, les bobines sont generalement numerotees de A a D correspondant aux cylindres 1 a 4. La bobine C alimente le cylindre 3 en haute tension pour creer l'etincelle. Un defaut peut etre confirme en permutant la bobine C avec une autre. Si le defaut se deplace vers le cylindre de destination, la bobine est confirmee defaillante. Les bobines d'origine ont une duree de vie variable selon les constructeurs mais generalement superieure a 100 000 km.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0353 code, it is telling you there is a problem with ignition coil c — primary circuit. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.
