description.fr: Le P0354 concerne la bobine D, celle du cylindre 4. Sur les moteurs turbo, le cylindre 4 est souvent le plus chaud, ce qui accelere l'usure de la bobine. Les puits de bougies peuvent aussi accumuler de l'humidite ou de l'huile si le joint de couvre-culasse fuit, provoquant des arcs electriques parasites qui detruisent la bobine. Si vous remplacez frequemment la bobine du cylindre 4, verifiez l'etat des joints du couvre-culasse et la presence d'huile ou d'eau dans le puits de bougie. Un puits sec et propre est essentiel pour la longevite de la bobine.
description.en: A P0354 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with ignition coil d — primary circuit. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

description.fr: Le P0410 signale un probleme dans le systeme d'injection d'air secondaire (SAI). Ce systeme injecte de l'air frais dans le collecteur d'echappement pendant le demarrage a froid pour aider le catalyseur a monter en temperature plus rapidement et a bruler les hydrocarbures non consumes. La pompe a air, le clapet anti-retour, la vanne de commutation ou les tuyaux peuvent etre defaillants. Sur les vehicules allemands (VW, BMW, Porsche), ce systeme est frequent et source reguliere de codes defauts. Le moteur fonctionne normalement mais les emissions a froid sont augmentees. Un bruit de soufflerie au demarrage qui a disparu peut indiquer une pompe HS.
description.en: The P0410 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with secondary air injection circuit. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.

description.fr: Le P0411 indique que le debit d'air du systeme d'injection d'air secondaire n'est pas conforme aux attentes. La pompe fonctionne mais le debit est insuffisant — soit la pompe faiblit, soit les tuyaux sont partiellement bouches, soit le clapet ne s'ouvre pas completement. Le calculateur verifie le fonctionnement du systeme SAI en observant la reaction de la sonde lambda quand la pompe est activee. Si la sonde ne detecte pas assez d'oxygene supplementaire, le debit est juge insuffisant. Ce code est souvent precurseur d'un P0410 complet si le systeme continue a se degrader.
description.en: When your car shows a P0411 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to secondary air injection — incorrect flow. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.

description.fr: Le P0460 signale un probleme sur le circuit du capteur de niveau de carburant dans le reservoir. Ce capteur, compose d'un flotteur et d'une resistance variable, indique la quantite de carburant restante. Un defaut de circuit rend la jauge d'essence au tableau de bord non fiable — elle peut indiquer plein en permanence, vide, ou ne plus bouger du tout. Le capteur est souvent integre au module de pompe a carburant dans le reservoir. Avec le temps, la piste resistive s'use, surtout dans la zone ou le flotteur passe le plus de temps. Le remplacement necessite de demonter le module de pompe a carburant.
description.en: Your car has stored a P0460 fault code, which points to an electrical issue with fuel level sensor circuit. The electrical system in a modern vehicle is remarkably complex, with multiple computers communicating over high-speed data networks and dozens of sensors feeding information back to the engine management system. When something goes wrong in this electrical web, the symptoms can be varied and sometimes puzzling. You might see warning lights appearing on the dashboard, experience intermittent starting problems, or notice that certain features like the radio or instrument cluster behave strangely. Common causes include ageing batteries, corroded earth connections, damaged wiring, or faulty relays and fuses. An auto electrician or a well-equipped garage can diagnose these issues using a combination of OBD2 scanners and multimeters. The repair could be as simple as cleaning a connection or replacing a fuse, or it might require more in-depth work on the alternator or a control module. Either way, electrical faults tend to get worse over time, so it is best to get them sorted sooner rather than later to avoid an unexpected breakdown.

description.fr: Le P0461 indique que le capteur de niveau de carburant donne des valeurs incoherentes. La jauge peut monter et descendre de maniere erratique ou rester figee a une certaine position malgre la consommation de carburant. La piste resistive du capteur presente probablement une zone morte ou la resistance saute brusquement, causant des lectures incorrectes. C'est un defaut de vieillissement classique. Le capteur ne peut pas etre repare et doit etre remplace. En attendant, reperage du kilometrage au plein pour estimer le niveau restant est la solution provisoire.
description.en: The P0461 code indicates an electrical system fault related to fuel level sensor — range/performance. Modern cars rely heavily on electrical components, and when there is an issue with the voltage supply, a sensor circuit, or a control module, the ECU logs a fault code to flag the problem. Electrical faults can be tricky because they sometimes cause unexpected symptoms — you might notice flickering dashboard lights, erratic instrument readings, a battery that drains overnight, or even problems starting the engine. In many cases, the root cause is something straightforward like a corroded connector, a blown fuse, or a weak battery approaching end of life. However, electrical issues can also indicate more serious problems with the alternator, the wiring harness, or even the ECU itself. A mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment can trace the electrical fault systematically, checking voltages and continuity to find the source. Do not attempt to ignore electrical faults, as they can lead to bigger problems if left untreated — for instance, an undercharging alternator will eventually leave you stranded with a flat battery.

description.fr: Le P0480 signale un probleme sur le circuit du ventilateur de refroidissement principal. Ce ventilateur electrique est essentiel pour maintenir la temperature moteur dans la plage normale, surtout en circulation urbaine ou le flux d'air naturel est insuffisant. Sans ventilateur, le moteur peut surchauffer dans les embouteillages. Les causes incluent un moteur de ventilateur grille, un relais defaillant, un fusible grille ou un capteur de temperature qui ne commande pas correctement l'activation. Le fusible du ventilateur est souvent de forte puissance (30A ou plus) et se trouve dans la boite a fusibles sous le capot.

description.fr: Le P0481 concerne le deuxieme ventilateur de refroidissement, present sur les vehicules equipes de deux motoventilateurs ou d'un ventilateur a deux vitesses. Ce second ventilateur s'active a une temperature plus elevee que le premier ou quand la climatisation est en marche pour aider a refroidir le condenseur. Un defaut sur ce circuit signifie que le refroidissement a haute charge est compromis. En conduite urbaine avec la climatisation en ete, le risque de surchauffe augmente significativement. Les causes sont les memes que pour le P0480 : moteur, relais ou fusible.

name.fr: Circuit air secondaire banque 1 debit insuffisant
name.en: Secondary air injection bank 1 — insufficient flow

description.fr: Le P0491 est specifique aux moteurs en V et indique un debit d'air secondaire insuffisant du cote de la banque 1. Le systeme d'injection d'air secondaire envoie de l'air frais dans l'echappement de chaque banque independamment. Si le debit est insuffisant cote banque 1, un tuyau bouche, un clapet bloque ou une derivation du debit vers la banque 2 peut etre en cause. Le catalyseur de la banque 1 met plus longtemps a monter en temperature a froid, augmentant les emissions pendant les premieres minutes. Ce code est souvent visible sur les VW/Audi et BMW a moteur en V.
description.en: The P0491 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with secondary air injection bank 1 — insufficient flow. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.

name.fr: Circuit air secondaire banque 2 debit insuffisant

description.fr: Le P0492 est le symetrique du P0491 pour la banque 2. Le debit d'air secondaire est insuffisant du cote banque 2. Si les deux codes P0491 et P0492 sont presents, la pompe SAI commune est probablement en cause. Si seul le P0492 apparait, cherchez du cote du clapet anti-retour ou du tuyau specifique a la banque 2. Sur les moteurs boxer (Subaru, Porsche), les tuyaux SAI sont longs et traversent le compartiment moteur, ce qui les expose aux fuites et aux obstructions. Un controle visuel de l'integrite des tuyaux est la premiere etape.
description.en: When your car shows a P0492 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to secondary air injection bank 2 — insufficient flow. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.

description.fr: Le P0520 signale un probleme sur le circuit du capteur de pression d'huile moteur. Ce capteur est essentiel pour surveiller que l'huile circule correctement et sous une pression suffisante pour lubrifier le moteur. Un defaut de circuit peut signifier que le capteur lui-meme est HS, que le cablage est coupe, ou que le connecteur est corrode. ATTENTION : ce code peut aussi masquer un vrai probleme de pression d'huile. Si le voyant d'huile s'allume en roulant, arretez-vous immediatement et verifiez le niveau d'huile. Ne prenez pas le risque de rouler sans pression d'huile, meme si vous pensez que c'est le capteur.
description.en: A P0520 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with engine oil pressure sensor circuit. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

description.fr: Le P0530 concerne le capteur de pression du circuit de climatisation (pressostat). Ce capteur mesure la pression du gaz refrigerant et empeche le compresseur de fonctionner si la pression est trop haute ou trop basse. Un defaut de circuit signifie que le calculateur ne peut pas lire la pression et desactive le compresseur par securite. Le capteur est monte sur la ligne haute pression du circuit de climatisation, generalement pres du condenseur. Un connecteur corrode ou un capteur defaillant sont les causes habituelles. Sans ce capteur, la climatisation ne refroidit plus car le compresseur refuse de s'enclencher.
description.en: The P0530 fault code indicates a problem with a/c refrigerant pressure sensor in your air conditioning system. While A/C faults are not as urgent as engine or brake issues, they can make driving uncomfortable, especially during warmer months. Your car's climate control system uses a network of sensors to monitor interior and exterior temperatures, refrigerant pressure, and compressor operation. When one of these sensors or components develops a fault, the system may not regulate temperature properly, the A/C might blow only warm air, or it might cut out intermittently. Common causes include a faulty temperature sensor, a refrigerant leak, a worn compressor clutch, or a clogged condenser. A garage equipped with A/C diagnostic tools can identify the specific issue quickly. Many A/C repairs are quite affordable — a sensor replacement or a re-gas might be all that is needed. More significant repairs like compressor replacement cost more, but they are still manageable. While this fault will not cause your car to fail its MOT directly, having a properly functioning climate control system makes for much more pleasant driving, particularly during the British summer and winter months.

description.fr: Le P0560 est un code general signalant une anomalie de la tension du systeme electrique vehicule. Le calculateur surveille en permanence la tension d'alimentation et si elle fluctue de maniere anormale ou sort des limites acceptables, ce code est enregistre. Des variations de tension peuvent affecter le fonctionnement de tous les capteurs et actuateurs. Les connexions de batterie corrodees, un alternateur avec un regulateur instable, ou une masse vehicule defaillante sont les causes frequentes. Un cable de masse mal serre entre le moteur et la carrosserie peut causer des problemes electriques multiples et erratiques.
description.en: Your car has stored a P0560 fault code, which points to an electrical issue with system voltage. The electrical system in a modern vehicle is remarkably complex, with multiple computers communicating over high-speed data networks and dozens of sensors feeding information back to the engine management system. When something goes wrong in this electrical web, the symptoms can be varied and sometimes puzzling. You might see warning lights appearing on the dashboard, experience intermittent starting problems, or notice that certain features like the radio or instrument cluster behave strangely. Common causes include ageing batteries, corroded earth connections, damaged wiring, or faulty relays and fuses. An auto electrician or a well-equipped garage can diagnose these issues using a combination of OBD2 scanners and multimeters. The repair could be as simple as cleaning a connection or replacing a fuse, or it might require more in-depth work on the alternator or a control module. Either way, electrical faults tend to get worse over time, so it is best to get them sorted sooner rather than later to avoid an unexpected breakdown.

description.fr: Le P0602 indique que la programmation du calculateur moteur ne correspond pas au vehicule ou est corrompue. Cela peut survenir apres une tentative de reprogrammation avortee, un remplacement de calculateur sans codage correct, ou une perte de memoire due a un debranchement prolonge de la batterie. Le calculateur fonctionne mais avec des parametres qui ne sont pas optimaux pour votre moteur specifique. Un passage chez le concessionnaire pour verification et reprogrammation eventuelle est necessaire. Les ateliers independants equipes de l'outil constructeur peuvent aussi effectuer cette operation.
description.en: The P0602 code indicates an electrical system fault related to engine ecu — programming error. Modern cars rely heavily on electrical components, and when there is an issue with the voltage supply, a sensor circuit, or a control module, the ECU logs a fault code to flag the problem. Electrical faults can be tricky because they sometimes cause unexpected symptoms — you might notice flickering dashboard lights, erratic instrument readings, a battery that drains overnight, or even problems starting the engine. In many cases, the root cause is something straightforward like a corroded connector, a blown fuse, or a weak battery approaching end of life. However, electrical issues can also indicate more serious problems with the alternator, the wiring harness, or even the ECU itself. A mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment can trace the electrical fault systematically, checking voltages and continuity to find the source. Do not attempt to ignore electrical faults, as they can lead to bigger problems if left untreated — for instance, an undercharging alternator will eventually leave you stranded with a flat battery.

description.fr: Le P0603 signale une erreur dans la memoire KAM (Keep Alive Memory) du calculateur moteur. La KAM stocke les valeurs apprises comme les corrections carburant a long terme, la position de ralenti et les adaptations diverses. Ces donnees se perdent quand la batterie est debranchee ou quand la memoire est corrompue. Le calculateur doit alors reapprendre toutes ces valeurs, ce qui peut prendre plusieurs cycles de conduite. Pendant ce reapprentissage, le ralenti peut etre instable et la consommation legerement plus elevee. Ce code se resout souvent seul apres quelques jours de conduite normale.

description.fr: Le P0604 indique une erreur dans la memoire vive (RAM) du calculateur moteur. Une erreur RAM est plus grave qu'une erreur KAM car elle affecte le fonctionnement en cours du moteur. Les causes incluent une surtension qui a endommage les puces memoire, un vieillissement naturel du composant electronique, ou un defaut de fabrication. Le calculateur doit etre diagnostique en profondeur et probablement remplace ou repare par un specialiste.

description.fr: Le P0625 signale un probleme sur le circuit de regulation de l'alternateur. Le calculateur moteur surveille la tension de champ (excitation) de l'alternateur pour verifier qu'il charge correctement. Un defaut sur ce circuit empeche le calculateur de communiquer avec l'alternateur pour ajuster la charge en fonction des besoins. L'alternateur peut continuer a fonctionner mais sans regulation fine, ce qui peut causer des fluctuations de tension. Sur les vehicules modernes, le calculateur reduit la charge de l'alternateur au ralenti pour economiser du carburant et l'augmente quand la batterie en a besoin.
description.en: Your car has stored a P0625 fault code, which points to an electrical issue with alternator field voltage circuit. The electrical system in a modern vehicle is remarkably complex, with multiple computers communicating over high-speed data networks and dozens of sensors feeding information back to the engine management system. When something goes wrong in this electrical web, the symptoms can be varied and sometimes puzzling. You might see warning lights appearing on the dashboard, experience intermittent starting problems, or notice that certain features like the radio or instrument cluster behave strangely. Common causes include ageing batteries, corroded earth connections, damaged wiring, or faulty relays and fuses. An auto electrician or a well-equipped garage can diagnose these issues using a combination of OBD2 scanners and multimeters. The repair could be as simple as cleaning a connection or replacing a fuse, or it might require more in-depth work on the alternator or a control module. Either way, electrical faults tend to get worse over time, so it is best to get them sorted sooner rather than later to avoid an unexpected breakdown.

description.fr: Le P0650 indique un probleme sur le circuit de commande du voyant moteur (MIL - Malfunction Indicator Lamp) au tableau de bord. Le calculateur ne parvient pas a allumer ou eteindre le voyant comme il le devrait. Cela peut sembler anodin mais c'est en fait un probleme de securite : si le voyant ne peut pas s'allumer, aucun code defaut ne sera visible pour le conducteur. Les causes sont un voyant grille, un cablage coupe entre le calculateur et le tableau de bord, ou un defaut de communication avec le combine d'instruments. Verifiez que le voyant s'allume bien a la mise du contact (test d'ampoule) puis s'eteint.
description.en: The P0650 code indicates an electrical system fault related to engine warning light circuit. Modern cars rely heavily on electrical components, and when there is an issue with the voltage supply, a sensor circuit, or a control module, the ECU logs a fault code to flag the problem. Electrical faults can be tricky because they sometimes cause unexpected symptoms — you might notice flickering dashboard lights, erratic instrument readings, a battery that drains overnight, or even problems starting the engine. In many cases, the root cause is something straightforward like a corroded connector, a blown fuse, or a weak battery approaching end of life. However, electrical issues can also indicate more serious problems with the alternator, the wiring harness, or even the ECU itself. A mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment can trace the electrical fault systematically, checking voltages and continuity to find the source. Do not attempt to ignore electrical faults, as they can lead to bigger problems if left untreated — for instance, an undercharging alternator will eventually leave you stranded with a flat battery.

description.fr: Le P0685 signale un probleme sur le circuit du relais principal qui alimente le calculateur moteur. Ce relais est la porte d'entree de l'alimentation electrique du calculateur. Si le relais est defaillant, le calculateur peut perdre son alimentation de maniere intermittente, provoquant des calages inopines et des demarrages impossibles. Le relais principal s'active quand vous mettez le contact et reste alimente tant que le moteur tourne. Un contact oxyde dans le relais, un fusible affaibli ou un cablage endommage peuvent tous provoquer ce code. Le relais est generalement dans la boite a fusibles.

description.fr: Le P0741 indique que l'embrayage de pontage du convertisseur de couple patine au lieu de se verrouiller fermement. Le calculateur commande le verrouillage mais detecte un ecart entre les vitesses d'entree et de sortie du convertisseur, signe de patinage. L'electrovanne TCC dans le corps de vanne peut etre fatiguee, l'embrayage lui-meme use, ou l'huile de transmission degradee avec un coefficient de friction insuffisant. Un changement d'huile de transmission avec le bon type de fluide peut parfois resoudre le probleme si le patinage est leger. Si l'embrayage est mecaniquement use, le convertisseur doit etre remplace.
description.en: The P0741 diagnostic code indicates a problem with torque converter clutch — circuit performance in your gearbox system. Modern automatic and semi-automatic gearboxes are controlled by a dedicated computer that manages gear changes, torque converter operation, and various solenoid valves. When this computer detects an anomaly, it stores a fault code and may put the gearbox into limp mode — this is a safety feature that limits the car to one or two gears to protect the transmission from further damage. You might notice harsh or delayed gear changes, a reluctance to shift, or the car staying in a low gear regardless of speed. While it can be concerning, limp mode is actually your gearbox protecting itself. A specialist garage with gearbox diagnostic equipment can read the code and assess whether the issue is electrical — such as a faulty speed sensor or solenoid — or mechanical, like worn clutch packs or a failing torque converter. Gearbox repairs can be costly, so early diagnosis is essential. Sometimes a simple fluid change and solenoid replacement is all that is needed, saving you from a far more expensive rebuild.

description.fr: Le P0751 signale que l'electrovanne de passage A de la boite automatique ne fonctionne pas correctement en termes de performance. La vanne repond mais pas dans les delais ou avec la precision attendue. Cela provoque des changements de rapport hesitants, retardes ou brutaux. L'huile de transmission encrassee qui empeche le libre mouvement du tiroir de l'electrovanne est une cause frequente. Un changement d'huile et de filtre de boite peut parfois resoudre les performances degradees d'une electrovanne. Si le probleme persiste, l'electrovanne doit etre remplacee dans le corps de vanne.
description.en: A P0751 fault code has been logged by your gearbox control module, indicating an issue with shift solenoid a — performance. This is a transmission-related fault that warrants prompt attention. Your automatic gearbox uses a network of sensors, solenoid valves, and hydraulic circuits to deliver smooth gear changes. When any of these components develop a fault, the gearbox ECU stores a code and may activate limp mode as a precaution. In limp mode, the gearbox typically locks into a single gear — usually second or third — to prevent further damage while still allowing you to drive to a garage. Symptoms you may have noticed include jerky gear changes, the gearbox slipping, delayed engagement when selecting drive or reverse, or the car revving high before changing gear. A transmission specialist will be able to diagnose the issue properly using dedicated equipment. The fix might be relatively simple, such as replacing a speed sensor or a solenoid valve, or it could indicate a more significant internal problem. Getting an accurate diagnosis early on can prevent a minor issue from turning into a major and expensive repair.

name.fr: Correction carburant aval trop pauvre banque 1
name.en: Post-catalyst fuel trim too lean — bank 1

description.fr: Le P2096 indique que le calculateur a atteint la limite de sa capacite de correction du melange basee sur la sonde lambda aval. La correction en aval est la correction fine que le calculateur fait en plus de la correction principale basee sur la sonde amont. Si cette correction est systematiquement trop positive (ajout de carburant), le calculateur stocke ce code. Les causes sous-jacentes incluent un catalyseur qui commence a perdre sa capacite de stockage d'oxygene, une sonde aval vieillissante, ou un probleme de melange que la correction amont ne compense pas completement.
description.en: When your car shows a P2096 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to post-catalyst fuel trim too lean — bank 1. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.

name.fr: Correction carburant aval trop riche banque 1
name.en: Post-catalyst fuel trim too rich — bank 1

description.fr: Le P2097 est l'inverse du P2096 : la correction de melange basee sur la sonde aval est systematiquement trop negative (reduction de carburant). Cela indique que le catalyseur stocke trop d'oxygene ou que la sonde aval est biaisee vers le riche. Un catalyseur neuf mais d'une qualite inferieure a l'original peut aussi provoquer ce code car sa capacite de stockage d'oxygene differe. Si le catalyseur a ete recemment remplace, cette cause est a considerer. Sinon, la sonde aval est generalement en fin de vie et donne une lecture legerement faussee vers le riche.
description.en: A P2097 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with post-catalyst fuel trim too rich — bank 1. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.

description.fr: Le P2187 est plus specifique que le P0171 : le melange est trop pauvre uniquement au ralenti. A plus haut regime, le dosage est normal. Cela pointe vers une prise d'air qui n'est significative qu'au ralenti, quand le debit d'air est faible. Un joint de collecteur d'admission qui ne fait plus son etancheite, un axe de papillon use qui laisse passer de l'air, ou un injecteur qui sous-dose legerement sont les pistes principales. C'est un code utile pour le diagnostic car il localise le probleme aux conditions de ralenti, ce qui reduit le champ des investigations.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P2187 relates to fuel mixture too lean at idle — bank 1, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

name.fr: Melange trop riche au ralenti banque 1
name.en: Fuel mixture too rich at idle — bank 1

description.fr: Le P2188 signale un melange trop riche specifiquement au ralenti. A plus haut regime le melange est normal. Un injecteur qui fuit au ralenti (goutte a goutte), un capteur de temperature d'air qui indique toujours froid, ou un regulateur de pression qui suralimente legerement au ralenti sont des causes possibles. Les bougies du vehicule peuvent aussi donner un indice : si elles sont noires et encrassees, le melange riche est confirme. Ce code est plus rare que le P2187 car les problemes de richesse au ralenti sont moins courants que les problemes de pauvrete.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P2188 code, it is telling you there is a problem with fuel mixture too rich at idle — bank 1. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.

name.fr: Sonde lambda aval signal reste pauvre banque 1
name.en: Downstream lambda sensor signal stuck lean — bank 1

description.fr: Le P2270 indique que la sonde lambda aval banque 1 envoie un signal constamment pauvre (tension basse). Cela peut signifier que le catalyseur n'est plus efficace et laisse passer un melange pauvre, ou que la sonde elle-meme est biaisee. Si la sonde amont et les corrections carburant sont normales, c'est probablement la sonde aval qui est en fin de vie. Un diagnostic en temps reel permet de voir si la sonde aval est figee en bas ou si elle reagit encore aux variations du melange. Ce code est souvent associe ou precurseur du P0420.
description.en: A P2270 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with downstream lambda sensor signal stuck lean — bank 1. This is part of the emissions control system, which ensures your car meets environmental standards. When this system is not working properly, your vehicle may produce more harmful gases than allowed, and this is something the MOT test will pick up during the emissions check. You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.

name.fr: Sonde lambda aval signal reste riche banque 1
name.en: Downstream lambda sensor signal stuck rich — bank 1

description.fr: Le P2271 est l'inverse du P2270 : la sonde aval reste en signal riche (tension haute) en permanence. Un catalyseur qui absorbe trop de carburant non brule, une sonde en court-circuit interne, ou un melange effectivement trop riche qui traverse le catalyseur sont les causes. Si le P0172 est aussi present, le probleme vient d'un melange riche en amont que le catalyseur ne peut pas entierement convertir. Si la sonde aval est la seule en defaut, remplacez-la en priorite car c'est la solution la moins couteuse. Le catalyseur est a tester seulement si le code revient apres remplacement de la sonde.
description.en: The P2271 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with downstream lambda sensor signal stuck rich — bank 1. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.

description.fr: Le C0242 signale que le module electronique de freinage (calculateur ABS/ESP) recoit une tension d'alimentation trop basse. Un calculateur sous-alimente ne peut pas garantir le bon fonctionnement des electrovannes ABS et desactive le systeme par securite. Les causes incluent une batterie faible, des connexions de batterie corrodees, un fusible a haute resistance, ou un cablage d'alimentation du module ABS endommage. Ce code peut aussi apparaitre si la tension chute brutalement au demarrage (demarreur qui consomme trop). Verifiez d'abord l'etat de la batterie et de ses connexions avant de suspecter le module ABS.
description.en: The C0242 fault code relates to electronic braking module — low voltage in your anti-lock braking system. The ABS is a crucial safety feature that prevents your wheels from locking up during heavy braking, allowing you to maintain steering control in emergency situations. When the ABS module detects a fault, it illuminates the ABS warning light on your dashboard and stores this code. Your normal brakes will still work perfectly fine, but the ABS function may be deactivated until the fault is repaired. This means that in an emergency stop, your wheels could lock up on slippery surfaces, which reduces your ability to steer. Common causes of ABS faults include dirty or damaged wheel speed sensors, corroded wiring, a faulty ABS ring on the wheel hub, or problems with the ABS hydraulic unit itself. A mechanic can diagnose the issue by reading the fault code and checking the sensor signals. Many ABS repairs are relatively straightforward and involve cleaning or replacing a sensor. It is worth noting that the MOT test does check the ABS warning light, so this needs fixing before your next test.

description.fr: Le B0011 est l'equivalent du B0010 pour le cote passager. L'airbag lateral du passager avant a un probleme de circuit electrique. Le connecteur sous le siege passager est soumis aux memes contraintes que cote conducteur : mouvements du siege, vibrations et risque de dommage par des objets glisses dessous. Les housses de siege non certifiees airbag peuvent aussi perturber le circuit en comprimant les connecteurs ou en bloquant le deploiement. Ce defaut desactive l'airbag lateral passager, reduisant la protection en cas de choc lateral. La reparation est urgente pour la securite du passager.
description.en: Your vehicle has stored a B0011 code, indicating a fault with passenger side airbag — circuit fault in the airbag system. The airbag warning light on your dashboard will be illuminated, signalling that the system may not function as intended in the event of an accident. While this does not affect the drivability of your car, it is a critical safety concern that should be addressed as soon as possible. The airbag system is made up of multiple components — crash sensors, the airbag control module, wiring harnesses, and the airbag units themselves. A fault in any of these can trigger a warning code. Common culprits include damaged wiring under the front seats, a worn clock spring in the steering column, a faulty seat occupancy sensor, or a connector that has become corroded over time. Due to the explosive nature of airbag components, repairs must be carried out by a trained professional. Your mechanic will use a specialist scanner to identify the specific fault and recommend the appropriate repair. Remember that an illuminated airbag light will result in an MOT failure, so this needs attention before your next test date.

description.fr: Le B0028 concerne l'airbag rideau du cote gauche (conducteur). Cet airbag, loge dans le pavillon au-dessus des vitres, se deploie verticalement pour proteger la tete des occupants en cas de choc lateral ou de tonneau. Le circuit electrique est defaillant — le deploiement n'est pas garanti en cas d'accident. Le cablage chemine dans le montant A, le pavillon et parfois le montant C. Un defaut de connexion ou un fil pince lors d'un demontage du pavillon (pour toit ouvrant, antenne, etc.) peut provoquer ce code. L'intervention sur les airbags rideaux est delicate car les detonateurs sont puissants.
description.en: The B0028 fault code is a serious one — it relates to left curtain airbag — circuit fault in your supplemental restraint system, commonly known as the airbag system. When the airbag warning light is illuminated on your dashboard, it means the airbag control module has detected a fault that could prevent one or more airbags from deploying correctly in a collision. This is obviously a significant safety concern, and while the car is perfectly safe to drive in terms of engine and braking performance, you should be aware that your passive safety protection may be compromised. Common causes include a faulty clock spring behind the steering wheel, a damaged wiring connector under a seat, a worn seat occupancy sensor, or an issue with the airbag module itself. Airbag repairs should always be carried out by a qualified technician because the system contains explosive charges. Never attempt to work on airbag components yourself. A diagnostic scan will identify exactly which part of the system is at fault, and your mechanic can then advise on the repair. The MOT test does check the airbag warning light, so this will need to be resolved before your next test.

description.fr: Le U0073 est un code reseau qui signale une deconnexion du bus CAN A. Le bus CAN A est generalement le bus haute vitesse qui relie les calculateurs critiques : moteur, transmission, ABS. Une deconnexion partielle peut signifier qu'un segment du bus est coupe mais que certains modules communiquent encore entre eux via d'autres chemins. Les symptomes varient selon quels modules sont isoles du bus. Un connecteur de diagnostic OBD2 endommage peut aussi causer ce code si le bus CAN passe par cette connexion. Verifiez l'etat de la prise OBD2 et du cablage CAN qui y mene.
description.en: The U0073 fault code relates to can bus a disconnected, which is a communication issue within your car's internal data network. Modern vehicles use a system called the CAN bus to allow different electronic modules to communicate with each other — the engine ECU, gearbox module, ABS system, airbag controller, and many others all share information over this network. When a module loses communication or there is a fault on the data bus, the affected systems may stop working correctly or go into a safe mode. Symptoms can be varied and sometimes confusing — you might see multiple warning lights on the dashboard, experience erratic behaviour from various systems, or find that some features simply stop working. Common causes include a damaged CAN bus wire, a corroded connector, a faulty module pulling down the network, or a software incompatibility after a module replacement. Diagnosing network faults requires specialist knowledge and equipment, as the technician needs to check the integrity of the communication lines and identify which module is causing the problem. While some network faults are minor and easily resolved, others can be more complex. Getting a proper diagnosis early will help prevent cascading failures across multiple systems.

en.question: How much does U0073 repair cost in the UK?

motFail: A CAN bus fault may cause an MOT failure if it results in illuminated ABS or airbag warning lights, which are both checked during the test. The network fault itself is not directly tested, but its knock-on effects on safety systems can cause a fail.

description.fr: Le U0028 signale une deconnexion du bus CAN vehicule, distinct du bus CAN moteur/transmission. Ce bus relie souvent les fonctions de confort et de carrosserie : BCM, combine d'instruments, systeme multimedia. Une deconnexion affecte les fonctions de confort mais pas necessairement le moteur et la transmission. Les fils CAN sont souvent des paires torsadees qui cheminent dans le faisceau principal. Un pincement ou une coupure a un endroit suffit a couper la communication. Le diagnostic par oscilloscope permet de localiser la zone de rupture en mesurant la qualite du signal a differents points du reseau.
description.en: Your vehicle has stored a U0028 fault code, indicating vehicle can bus disconnected, a problem on the vehicle's CAN bus communication network. Think of the CAN bus as the nervous system of your car — it allows all the different electronic control units to talk to each other and share vital information. When this communication breaks down, it can affect multiple systems simultaneously. You might notice several warning lights appearing at once, instruments behaving erratically, or certain functions becoming unresponsive. The root cause could be a physical wiring problem — a broken wire, a corroded connector, or water ingress into a plug. It could also be a failed electronic module dragging down the entire network, or a software mismatch between modules. A skilled auto electrician or diagnostic specialist can use an oscilloscope and advanced scanner to examine the CAN bus signals and isolate the fault. Repairs might be as simple as fixing a damaged connector, or they could involve replacing a faulty control module. These issues are best addressed promptly, as a degraded communication network can lead to unpredictable behaviour from safety-critical systems like the ABS or airbag.

name.en: Lost communication with fuel injection ECU

description.fr: Le U0102 concerne specifiquement la perte de communication avec le module de gestion de l'injection carburant. Sur certains vehicules, l'injection est geree par un module separe du calculateur moteur principal. Ce module controle les injecteurs, la pompe haute pression et le regulateur de pression. Sans communication, le systeme d'injection peut se mettre en mode degrade autonome ou s'arreter completement. Les vehicules diesel common rail sont particulierement concernes car leur systeme d'injection est souvent gere par un module dedie. Verifiez l'alimentation et les connexions CAN du module d'injection.
description.en: The U0102 fault code relates to lost communication with fuel injection ecu, which is a communication issue within your car's internal data network. Modern vehicles use a system called the CAN bus to allow different electronic modules to communicate with each other — the engine ECU, gearbox module, ABS system, airbag controller, and many others all share information over this network. When a module loses communication or there is a fault on the data bus, the affected systems may stop working correctly or go into a safe mode. Symptoms can be varied and sometimes confusing — you might see multiple warning lights on the dashboard, experience erratic behaviour from various systems, or find that some features simply stop working. Common causes include a damaged CAN bus wire, a corroded connector, a faulty module pulling down the network, or a software incompatibility after a module replacement. Diagnosing network faults requires specialist knowledge and equipment, as the technician needs to check the integrity of the communication lines and identify which module is causing the problem. While some network faults are minor and easily resolved, others can be more complex. Getting a proper diagnosis early will help prevent cascading failures across multiple systems.

description.fr: Le U0164 indique que le module de climatisation ne communique plus sur le bus CAN. Sans communication, la climatisation peut fonctionner en mode degrade ou s'arreter. Le module de climatisation est souvent derriere le tableau de bord, dans une zone moins exposee. Verifiez son alimentation et le fusible dedie avant de suspecter un probleme de bus CAN.

description.fr: Le U0300 signale une incompatibilite de version logicielle entre deux ou plusieurs calculateurs du vehicule. Apres une mise a jour logicielle d'un module ou le remplacement d'un calculateur, les versions de protocole doivent correspondre pour que la communication soit fiable. Un module avec un logiciel plus ancien peut ne pas comprendre les nouvelles commandes d'un module recemment mis a jour. Ce code apparait souvent apres des interventions en atelier qui n'ont pas mis a jour tous les modules concernes. Un passage chez le concessionnaire pour une mise a jour globale des calculateurs est generalement necessaire.

description.fr: Le P2135 est un code de securite critique signalant que les signaux des capteurs A et B du papillon des gaz ne correspondent pas entre eux. Sur les vehicules avec papillon electronique, les deux capteurs doivent se suivre en miroir — si l'un augmente, l'autre doit diminuer proportionnellement. Une discordance au-dela du seuil de tolerance active immediatement le mode degrade. Ce code peut apparaitre si le boitier papillon est tres encrasse et que les deux capteurs ne lisent plus les memes positions. Un nettoyage suivi d'un reapprentissage est la premiere intervention. Si le probleme persiste, le boitier complet doit etre remplace.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P2135 code, it is telling you there is a problem with throttle position sensor a/b correlation. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.

name.fr: Capteur position pedale accelerateur correlation D/E
name.en: Accelerator pedal position sensor D/E correlation

description.fr: Le P2138 signale que les deux capteurs integres a la pedale d'accelerateur electronique ne sont pas en accord. Comme pour le papillon, la pedale dispose de deux capteurs redondants pour la securite. Si les signaux divergent, le calculateur ne peut pas determiner la demande reelle du conducteur et active le mode degrade. La pedale d'accelerateur electronique est un composant robuste mais le connecteur et le cablage sous le tableau de bord peuvent souffrir de l'humidite (surtout si le vehicule fuit au pare-brise). Un tapis de sol mal positionne qui interfere mecaniquement avec la pedale peut aussi fausser les lectures.
description.en: A P2138 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with accelerator pedal position sensor d/e correlation. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

description.fr: Le P2015 concerne le capteur de position des volets dans le collecteur d'admission a longueur variable. Les collecteurs modernes ont des volets internes qui modifient la longueur des conduits d'admission pour optimiser le remplissage a differents regimes. Le capteur detecte la position de ces volets. Si le capteur indique une position qui ne correspond pas a la commande du calculateur, ce code apparait. Les volets peuvent se bloquer par l'encrassement (calamine) surtout sur les moteurs a injection directe ou la recirculation EGR souille l'admission. Un nettoyage du collecteur est parfois necessaire en plus du remplacement du capteur.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P2015 relates to intake manifold position sensor — range/performance, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

description.fr: Le P2177 est complementaire au P2187 : le melange est pauvre mais uniquement en dehors du ralenti, c'est-a-dire en charge. Au ralenti, le dosage est correct. Cela pointe vers un debitmetre qui sous-estime le debit d'air a haut debit, une pompe a carburant qui ne suit pas la demande en charge, ou un filtre a carburant qui restreint le debit. La prise d'air est moins probable car au ralenti elle aurait aussi un impact. Ce code affine le diagnostic par rapport au P0171 general et oriente vers les composants sollicites en charge. Verifiez la pression de carburant sous charge avec un manometre.

description.fr: Le P2178 signale un melange riche uniquement en charge. Au ralenti le melange est correct. Un regulateur de pression de carburant qui fournit trop de pression en charge, un capteur MAP ou MAF qui surestime le debit d'air, ou un capteur de temperature d'air qui indique une temperature trop basse (air dense = plus de carburant) sont les causes probables. Ce code permet de cibler les composants qui ne fonctionnent pas correctement uniquement sous charge, ce qui reduit la liste des suspects par rapport au P0172 general. Verifiez les lectures des capteurs en temps reel pendant une acceleration.

name.fr: Chauffage sonde lambda amont tension basse banque 1
name.en: Upstream lambda sensor heater — low voltage (bank 1)

description.fr: Le P0031 indique que le circuit de chauffage de la sonde lambda amont banque 1 a une tension anormalement basse. Un court-circuit dans le cablage du chauffage ou un element chauffant partiellement en court-circuit sont les causes typiques. L'element chauffant consomme normalement entre 2 et 5 amperes. Si la resistance est trop faible, le courant augmente et la tension chute. Le fusible du chauffage peut aussi griller si le court-circuit est severe. Verifiez la resistance du chauffage avec un multimetre : elle doit etre entre 3 et 15 ohms selon le modele de sonde.
description.en: The P0031 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with upstream lambda sensor heater — low voltage (bank 1). Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.

name.en: Upstream lambda sensor heater — high voltage (bank 1)

description.fr: Le P0032 signale une tension haute sur le circuit de chauffage de la sonde amont, generalement un circuit ouvert. Le fil de chauffage est coupe ou le connecteur est debranche. Sans chauffage, la sonde met plusieurs minutes a atteindre sa temperature de fonctionnement au lieu de 20 secondes. Le calculateur maintient la boucle ouverte plus longtemps, augmentant la consommation et les emissions. Verifiez le connecteur de la sonde, surtout s'il a ete debranche recemment lors d'un entretien. Un fil ronge par un rongeur est aussi une cause frequente.
description.en: When your car shows a P0032 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to upstream lambda sensor heater — high voltage (bank 1). Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. Common culprits include a worn catalytic converter, ageing lambda sensors, or exhaust leaks. The good news is that a qualified mechanic with an OBD2 scanner can usually pinpoint the root cause fairly quickly, and many repairs are more affordable than you might expect. Do not ignore this code — getting it sorted sooner rather than later will save you money and help your car pass its next MOT without any drama.

description.fr: Le P0037 concerne la tension basse du circuit de chauffage de la sonde aval. Le chauffage de la sonde situee apres le catalyseur presente un court-circuit. Comme la sonde aval ne participe pas au reglage du melange, l'impact sur la conduite est nul. Cependant, la sonde ne peut plus correctement surveiller le catalyseur quand elle n'atteint pas sa temperature de fonctionnement rapidement. Le fusible et le cablage sont les premiers elements a verifier avant de remplacer la sonde. Le court-circuit peut aussi provenir de l'interieur de la sonde elle-meme.
description.en: A P0037 code appearing on your dashboard means the engine management system has detected a problem with downstream lambda sensor heater — low voltage (bank 1). You might not notice much difference in how the car drives day to day — perhaps a slight increase in fuel consumption or a faint smell from the tailpipe. However, it is well worth getting this looked at promptly. A good garage will use diagnostic equipment to read the live data from your engine and determine exactly what needs attention. Repairs can range from a simple sensor replacement to something more involved like a catalytic converter swap, but your mechanic will be able to give you an honest assessment. The sooner you act, the less likely the problem is to snowball into something more expensive down the line.

description.fr: Le P0105 est le code general du capteur de pression absolue du collecteur (MAP) signalant un dysfonctionnement de circuit. Le signal est absent ou completement hors plage. Le calculateur ne peut pas determiner la charge moteur et utilise une estimation basee sur le regime et la position du papillon. Cette estimation est moins precise et degrade les performances et la consommation. Le capteur MAP est un composant petit et peu couteux mais son tuyau de raccordement est souvent la source du probleme : fissure, debranche ou bouche par de la condensation.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0105 code, it is telling you there is a problem with map sensor — circuit fault. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.

description.fr: Le P0111 signale que le capteur de temperature d'air d'admission fonctionne mais ses valeurs ne correspondent pas aux attentes du calculateur. La temperature mesuree change trop vite, trop lentement ou ne correspond pas aux conditions ambiantes. Un capteur dont la caracteristique a derive, un emplacement incorrect apres un remplacement de filtre a air, ou un capteur expose a de l'air chaud recircule sont des causes possibles. Le calculateur compare la temperature IAT avec la temperature ECT au demarrage a froid pour verifier la coherence.
description.en: A P0111 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with intake air temperature sensor — range/performance. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

description.fr: Le P0115 est le code general du capteur ECT signalant un dysfonctionnement de circuit. Le signal de temperature est absent ou completement hors plage. Le calculateur ne connait pas la temperature du moteur et utilise une valeur par defaut, generalement 80 degres. Cela signifie que les corrections de temperature a froid ne sont pas appliquees et que le ventilateur peut etre mal commande. Le capteur est un petit composant visse dans le bloc moteur ou le boitier de thermostat, generalement facile d'acces et peu couteux. Le probleme est souvent au connecteur plutot qu'au capteur.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0115 relates to coolant temperature sensor — circuit, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

description.fr: Le P0173 est l'equivalent du P0170 pour la banque 2 sur les moteurs en V. Les corrections carburant de la banque 2 sont hors limites. Si P0170 et P0173 sont presents ensemble, le probleme affecte les deux banques et pointe vers un composant commun. Si seul le P0173 apparait, le probleme est specifique a la banque 2. Les memes causes s'appliquent : debitmetre, prises d'air, injecteurs, pression carburant ou sonde lambda. Le diagnostic par comparaison des corrections entre banques est la cle pour localiser le probleme.
description.en: A P0173 fault code has been detected by your car's engine management system, indicating a problem with fuel trim bank 2 — malfunction. The ECU is essentially the brain of your engine, and when it spots something out of the ordinary, it stores this code to help your mechanic diagnose the issue. You may have noticed the engine warning light on your dashboard, and perhaps some changes in how the car feels — maybe a slight judder at idle, a moment of hesitation when you press the accelerator, or a general feeling that the engine is not quite as responsive as usual. These are all typical signs of an engine management issue. The good news is that most of these problems have well-understood causes and straightforward fixes. It could be anything from a dirty sensor to a worn spark plug or a small air leak in the intake system. A proper OBD2 diagnostic at your local garage will identify exactly what is going on, and in many cases the repair is quicker and cheaper than you might fear. Do get it looked at sooner rather than later to avoid any knock-on problems.

description.fr: Le P0205 concerne le circuit electrique de l'injecteur du cylindre 5, present sur les moteurs 5 cylindres et plus. Le diagnostic et les causes sont identiques aux P0201-P0204 mais localises sur le cinquieme cylindre. Sur les moteurs en V, l'injecteur du cylindre 5 fait partie de la banque 2 et son cablage peut avoir un cheminement different de ceux de la banque 1. Verifiez la resistance de l'injecteur, l'etat du connecteur et du faisceau. La permutation avec un injecteur d'un autre cylindre permet de confirmer si c'est l'injecteur ou le cablage.
description.en: The diagnostic trouble code P0205 relates to fuel injector cylinder 5 — circuit fault, which is a fault within the engine management system. Your car uses dozens of sensors and actuators to ensure the engine runs efficiently, and when one of these components starts to play up, the ECU stores a fault code and turns on the engine warning light. This is your car's way of asking for a bit of attention. Common symptoms you might experience include rough idling, slight misfires, reduced acceleration, or increased fuel consumption. While many engine fault codes do not require you to stop driving immediately, it is always wise to get the issue investigated promptly. A trained technician will connect a diagnostic tool to your car's OBD2 port, read the code, and examine the live data to determine the exact cause. Repairs vary from simple maintenance tasks like replacing spark plugs or cleaning sensors, to more involved work on components like the throttle body or fuel injectors. Whatever the cause, addressing it early will save you money in the long run and keep your car running at its best.

description.fr: Le P0206 signale un defaut electrique sur l'injecteur du cylindre 6. Ce code n'apparait que sur les moteurs 6 cylindres et plus. L'injecteur du cylindre 6 est generalement le dernier de la rampe d'injection et peut avoir un cablage plus long, plus expose aux dommages mecaniques et thermiques. Sur les 6 cylindres en ligne, cet injecteur est le plus proche du volant moteur. Sur les V6, il est generalement le troisieme de la banque 2. Mesurez la resistance de l'injecteur et verifiez l'etat complet du faisceau d'injection cote banque 2.
description.en: When your car's computer stores a P0206 code, it is telling you there is a problem with fuel injector cylinder 6 — circuit fault. This is an engine-related fault, and while it might sound alarming, many engine codes are more of a nuisance than an emergency. Your engine management system is incredibly sophisticated — it monitors hundreds of parameters every second to keep everything running smoothly. When something drifts outside the normal range, the system logs a fault code and illuminates the engine warning light on your dashboard. Depending on the severity, you might notice symptoms like rough running, hesitation during acceleration, slightly higher fuel consumption, or an unstable idle. In many cases, you can continue to drive carefully, but it is important to get the car checked as soon as reasonably possible. Ignoring engine faults can lead to secondary damage — for example, a misfire left unchecked can damage the catalytic converter over time. A good mechanic with proper diagnostic equipment will be able to read the code and the associated live data to identify the root cause and get you back on the road with confidence.

description.fr: Le P0251 concerne le doseur de carburant de la pompe d'injection, principalement sur les moteurs diesel a pompe distributrice. Le doseur controle la quantite de carburant envoye aux injecteurs. Si ses performances sont degradees, le dosage est imprecis : trop ou pas assez de carburant. Le moteur peut avoir des a-coups, des variations de regime et des fumees. Sur les pompes Bosch VP44 et Lucas/Delphi, le doseur est un composant electromagnetique integre a la pompe. Sa defaillance peut necessiter la renovation complete de la pompe d'injection, une operation specialisee.

description.fr: Le P0326 indique que le capteur de cliquetis banque 1 fonctionne mais ses performances sont degradees. Le signal est present mais trop faible ou parasite pour etre fiable. Un capteur mal serre est souvent en cause : le couple de serrage du capteur piezoelectrique sur le bloc est critique. Trop serre, il est ecrase et ne vibre plus. Pas assez serre, il ne capte pas correctement les vibrations du bloc. Un support moteur use qui transmet des vibrations parasites peut aussi perturber le signal. Le calculateur retarde l'avance par precaution.

description.fr: Le P0337 indique que le signal du capteur de vilebrequin est trop faible. Le capteur est un generateur magnetique dont le signal depend de la distance avec la roue dentee et de la qualite du capteur. Un entrefer trop grand (capteur repousse, usure mecanique) ou un capteur dont l'aimant s'affaiblit sont les causes principales. Le signal faible provoque des lectures erratiques de la vitesse du vilebrequin, ce qui affecte le timing d'injection et d'allumage. Le moteur peut hesiter, avoir des a-coups ou des difficultes de demarrage.

description.fr: Le P0338 signale une tension anormalement haute sur le capteur de vilebrequin, soit un circuit ouvert. Le fil de signal est coupe entre le capteur et le calculateur. Sans signal de vilebrequin, le moteur ne peut generalement pas demarrer ou s'arrete instantanement. Certains vehicules peuvent fonctionner avec le seul capteur d'arbre a cames en mode degrade. Inspectez visuellement le cablage du capteur qui chemine pres des pieces rotatives du moteur et peut etre coupe par frottement. Un rongeur peut aussi avoir grignote l'isolant du fil.

name.fr: Capteur position EGR A tension haute
name.en: EGR position sensor A — high voltage

description.fr: Le P0406 signale une tension elevee sur le capteur de position de la vanne EGR, indiquant que la vanne semble ouverte en permanence. Si c'est un faux signal (capteur ou cablage en circuit ouvert), le calculateur desactive l'EGR par securite. Si la vanne est reellement bloquee ouverte, le moteur etouffe au ralenti car les gaz d'echappement remplacent l'air frais. Differencier les deux cas necessite une inspection visuelle de la vanne et un test electrique du capteur. Les vannes EGR se bloquent ouvertes quand la calamine s'accumule au point d'empecher la fermeture.
description.en: The P0406 diagnostic trouble code indicates that your vehicle's emissions control system has flagged up an issue with egr position sensor a — high voltage. Your car's ECU constantly monitors exhaust gas composition using sensors before and after the catalytic converter. When the readings suggest the system is not cleaning up exhaust gases effectively, this fault code is stored. From a driving perspective, you may notice a slight drop in fuel economy or perhaps a rotten egg smell from the exhaust on occasion. The key concern here is the MOT test — emissions failures are one of the most common reasons cars fail, and this code directly relates to that. A trained technician can run a proper diagnostic to identify whether it is a sensor issue, a catalytic converter problem, or something simpler like an exhaust leak. Most of these repairs are straightforward and well within the capabilities of any decent garage. Getting it fixed promptly will keep your running costs down and ensure a smooth MOT experience.

description.fr: Le P0407 concerne le capteur secondaire de position EGR (si present) avec une tension basse. Certaines vannes EGR ont deux capteurs de position pour la redondance. Une tension basse signifie un court-circuit dans le circuit du second capteur. Le diagnostic et les causes sont similaires au P0405. Si le vehicule n'a qu'un seul capteur EGR, ce code peut indiquer un defaut interne du module EGR integre. Le remplacement de la vanne EGR complete resout generalement le probleme. Avant de remplacer la piece, verifiez bien le faisceau electrique et les connecteurs pour exclure une cause plus simple et moins couteuse.
description.en: When your car shows a P0407 fault code, it means something in the emissions system is not quite right. Specifically, the issue relates to egr position sensor b — low voltage. Your car's onboard computer, known as the ECU, monitors how cleanly exhaust gases leave the engine. When the readings fall outside the expected range, this code gets stored and the engine warning light comes on. This is an important issue because emissions are tested during your MOT, and a fault here could result in a fail. In most cases, you can still drive the car safely, but you may notice slightly higher fuel consumption or an unusual smell from the exhaust. description.fr: Le P0444 indique que le circuit de la vanne de purge EVAP est en circuit ouvert. La bobine de l'electrovanne ne recoit plus de courant car le fil est coupe, le connecteur est debranche ou la bobine elle-meme est grillee. La vanne reste fermee en permanence et les vapeurs du canister ne sont jamais purgees vers le moteur. A terme, le canister peut saturer et les vapeurs d'essence s'echappent dans l'atmosphere. Ce code n'affecte pas la conduite mais pose un probleme environnemental et de controle technique.
